Name: MNT SmartSolutions
Description:
MNT SmartSolutions is a biotech company that is engineering sustainable, modern “smart” materials, with unique electronic and magnetic properties to advance science and medicine. These novel materials effectively prevent and treat periodontal disease and dental caries by noninvasively targeting the bacterial biofilms on the surfaces of the teeth, orthodontic wires, crowns, bridges, areas between the teeth and beneath the gum line in an ecofriendly manner. The technology also has great potential as an internal or topical anti-bacterial agent and may be extended to virtually any application in which antimicrobial action is sought.
One of every two American adults suffers with periodontal disease; the prevalence rises to 70 % in adults aged 65 and older and is as high as 100% in developing countries. Periodontal disease is a chronic inflammatory condition stemming from the persistence of bacterial biofilm infections (the dental plaque) in the mouth. It is considered the 11th most prevalent disease in the world. Along with gingivitis, periodontitis is the most common of adolescent and adult gum diseases. Not only can periodontal diseases lead to tooth loss, but they are also linked to numerous other serious diseases and health problems.
MNT SmartSolutions is developing a novel, nanotechnology-based, interactive toothpaste/toothbrush combination product. Our nano-composites can be used to treat and prevent microbial growth and plaque formation in the mouth, be magnetic-gradient guided to target infected areas, and perform instantaneous biofilm disruption, along with the sustained-release of active agents to the biofilms over time. This smart toothpaste can be switched on and off, remote controlled by an electromagnetic field, move, scrub, and even generate heat when used in combination with the interactive toothbrush. This product will to revolutionize the oral care industry, which has remained unchanged for as long as most people can remember.

Name: Project ZEOCOAT
Description:
Under the current climate change, water scarcity is becoming an increasingly serious problem. The removal of contaminants from the wastewater can save water resources and is therefore an important current research direction. There are many approaches to purifying water using photoactive compounds, but most of them are used in the form of powders/suspensions and have to be filtered out of the water again after the use, which is time-consuming and costly. Photocatalytically active surfaces that are immobilized on an inexpensive carrier do not have this disadvantage.
The project aims to produce highly efficient thin-film photocatalysts on Ti and Al substrates using plasma electrolytic oxidation (PEO). From a technical point of view, the PEO layer itself can be the photocatalyst or can become so by adding photoactive particles. In this project, PEO coatings will contain incorporated zeolites, which provide an additional enlargement of the surface, while the zeolites themselves will be optimized with regard to photocatalytic properties. The ion exchange ability of selected zeolites also enables direct removal of impurities from the water.
The aim of the present project is therefore the production of light and efficient sheet metal modules made of Al or Ti alloys for wastewater treatment by depositing photocatalytically active oxide coatings on their surface, exploiting newly developed concept of zeolite incorporation by plasma electrolytic oxidation.

Name: EIC Pathfinder LEAF
Description:
The LEAF Project
LEAF introduces an ultrathin foil (~5 µm) that seamlessly integrates energy harvesting, storage, and 3D reshaping capabilities. Fabricated using advanced inkjet and high-precision capillary printing (HPCAP), the foil is built on a temporary carrier with a sacrificial adhesion layer made from a proprietary lanthanum-acrylic acid coordination polymer.

The core structure is a bilayer consisting of a polyethylene-alt-maleic anhydride-based hydrogel and a stiffening polyimide layer. This setup enables controlled transformation into compact, Swiss-roll-like 3D shapes a few hundred micrometers in diameter. The reshaping is triggered by selective etching of the sacrificial layer, followed by hydrogel swelling in a water-based solution. This process enhances mechanical stability and allows the device to conform to curved or flexible surfaces while maintaining full functionality.

A key innovation in LEAF is its self-powering capability. Interdigitated microelectrodes on the foil are coated with bifunctional materials that both harvest light and store energy, forming a microscale “photo-storage” unit. The stored energy powers an integrated chip, such as a radio-frequency IC, enabling fully autonomous sensor nodes.

The 2D layout maximizes light absorption and energy conversion, while the device’s minimal thickness ensures a high weight-to-functionality ratio (R ≈ 0.95). Structural integrity and performance are preserved even after reshaping.

LEAF represents a breakthrough in combining materials science, energy systems, and flexible electronics into a single, scalable platform. Its manufacturing approach enables reproducible, low-maintenance, energy-autonomous devices suitable for environmental monitoring, smart packaging, healthcare, and IoT applications.

Name: epiray United States

epiray United States Inc. is the subsidiary of epiray GmbH. Epiray is a world leader in Thermal Laser Epitaxy (TLE), a novel technology for the deposition of high-purity thin films. It's a spin-off of the Max Planck Society, pioneering a new era of epitaxy research.

Thermal Laser Epitaxy (TLE) is a new deposition technology that will significantly impact thin film research and production.

TLE adds significant flexibility and speed to thin-film research. Targets can be changed on a daily basis, and almost any material can be used. Layers of ultra-high purity can be deposited. Multiple cheap chambers can be used in parallel with one set of lasers, thus widely different materials can be used in parallel. Operating cost are low. It allows to conduct many more experiments in a given timeframe, with more diverse elements, than any other epitaxy method on the market.

Name: FiberCraze Co., Ltd
Description:
Established in 2021 as a Gifu University startup with the world's unique nano-porous technology as its core technology, which was born from academic research.
With our mission of “Create Materials the World Can Be Proud of," we aim to create new value by bringing together Japanese technological capabilities and establish materials that will serve as infrastructure for the development of lifestyles and industry.
We are taking on the challenge of solving serious social problems worldwide, such as malaria, dengue fever, and other infectious diseases caused by mosquitoes. It is predicted that the virus may spread more widely in the future due to population growth and global warming.
We are taking on the challenge of solving this problem with a unique new material. We create nano-sized pores in fibers and impregnate them with anti-mosquito ingredients. The anti-mosquito ingredients are then slowly released to keep mosquitoes away. Through this process, we are developing clothes that prevent infectious diseases. Evidence has already been obtained in Japan, and we are currently working with an infectious disease research institute in Malaysia to conduct demonstration tests in Southeast Asia.

Name: Cargador de Mitocondrias
Description:
CARGADOR DE MITOCONDRIAS, es un invento disruptivo que une la ingeniería, las ciencias de la vida y la salud, para acercar a personas desahuciadas la posibilidad de complementar cualquier tratamiento con el fin de acelerar su recuperación (si, su recuperación) de manera cómoda e inteligente. Raúl Macías (su inventor), construye y personaliza cada Cargador de Mitocondrias con el fin de ayudar a eliminar malestares, dolores e inflamaciones, eliminar microorganismos y fortalecer el  sistema inmunologico, incluso, de personas sanas. Considerada como medicina del futuro, la carga mitocóndrica es una técnica no tóxica y ni invasiva que equilibra las funciones del cuerpo mediante terapias ambulatorias.
Este equipo de última generación, produce un haz de fonones de alta frecuencia, cuyos efectos (predominantemente no térmicos) permiten alterar muchos parámetros en los mecanismos básicos del control de mitosis (división celular) y apoptosis (muerte programada). 
La carga de mitocondrias (orgánulos celulares encargados de suministrar la mayor parte de la energía necesaria para la actividad celular) ahora es posible. Esto es importante porque las mitocondrias son las encargadas de actuar como centrales energéticas en las células del cuerpo humano.

Name: Smarterra
Description:
Smarterra  is a Nanotechnology platform. Nanotechnology is the basis for the next industrial revolution. We have several samples of successful business cases e.g. at chemical industry. 

Nanotechnology is everywhere, in our clothing, cars, windows, computer and displays, even in our cosmetics and medicine adding new functionalities, intelligence, integrations, portability and networking capability in many new products with high market potential. 

Nanotechnology helps Europe to address global challenges such as climate change, constraints in energy production and shortage of resources, insufficient access to clean water and food safety, as well as widespread diseases and affordable health care worldwide. 

However, the true potential of nanotechnology is not yet exploited exhaustively. Smarterra brings together industry, research, networks NGOs at all levels for a joint movement towards a new industry.

Name: Enlightco AG
Description:
In 1997 the inventors of the Enlightco technology discovered the potential of illuminated foils. Several R&D initiatives swiftly followed with hundreds of tests and prototypes being experimented with and made. After several years of experimentation an illuminated "paste" polymer was then refined, with multiple applications and uses. The then small and dedicated Enlightco team realised that they stumbled on something revolutionary, something that could redefine the way we use light - a new form of lighting.

Further R&D was done on the use of Enlightco’s paste on of steel plates. This opened the door to the first cross industry lighting solution for Enlightco. The first patent "illuminated road markings" was tried in the year of 2012.

Soon after Enlightco's technology was also evaluated for the use in the aviation industry, which has one of the highest quality and safety standard requirements in the world. Enlightco's technology met and surpassed Fire, Smoke and Toxicity (FST) aviation tests.

Today Enlightco cooperates with internationally recognized partners and prosperous market leaders in their respective industries to bring them light and design solutions not possible before. 

Our Vision

The way we use light has remained the same for over 130 years, with little innovation or change in the way we use it. Our vision at ENLIGHTCO is to redefine the way we use light by utilising it as a solution as well as a gateway to linking other technologies together to make SMART SOLUTIONS. By redefining light and its use, we have managed to open a new market for the lighting industry. Our vision is to become the MARKET LEADER in this lighting space.

In ENLIGHTCO we redefine light

For more information please email us on: info@enlightco.com // or // contact us on: +43 (0)4262 27 183

Or visit our website: www.enlightco.com

Name: Oil Gels
Description:
We control the product’s shape, texture & function with a drop of oil gelator in a radically effective way. 
Oil Gelators can efficiently control solid-state, texture, spreadability and function of millions of products.
A combination of different factors, including regulations requiring the elimination of saturated fats, rising concerns among consumers health, about ecological damage caused by palm oil production, have together provided motivation for us to focus on innovative solutions.
Organogelators and emulsifiers show a remarkable gelation efficiency in various vegetable oils and water in oil emulsions, a thermal and mechanical stability, self-healing properties based on self-assembled principles, a long period of stability and simultaneous delivery of hydro and liposoluble bioactive components.
Organic oil gelators transform oil to solid-state up to 100x more efficient than available additives.
In order to replace saturated fats (solid fat) with unsaturated fats (liquid oil) without disturbing structural and sensory characteristics of the food product, the properties of the liquid oil have to be structured to the state of solid fats.
Structuring of healthy oil through gelation phenomenon could serve as replacement of solid fats in both water-free (shortenings and chocolates) and water-containing (margarine, spreads and cooked meat products) products with possibility for controlled delivery of nutraceuticals.
The powerful applicability of vegetable oil gelators is envisaged in food (oil, meat, confectionary industry), cosmetics, pharmaceutical industry, oil industry, paints and coatings, and agrochemicals.
There have been identified many potential structurants of oil, but there is still a need to find a food-grade oleogelator that is economical, efficient at low concentration, tolerant to processing conditions, compatible with the final composition of a product and primarily having a potent thixotropic property.

Herculean's founding team is diverse in backgrounds and share a common philosophy: Create cool products and enjoy doing it!

Herculean is based in Melbourne Florida with a small, but growing team of talented developers and entrepreneurs. We are focused on improving life through better, smarter and elegant technology. Nanotechnology offers us the platform to realize amazing new products that will innovate how we do things.

We found that nanotechnology can solve issues that would make life simpler and tasks more efficient, especially in VR and Simulations. We found that there is an amazing amount of discovery in nanotechnology that we can take and commercialize for groundbreaking solutions to today’s and tomorrow’s problems in VR, Simulations, Health and many other industries.

Imagine being able to feel a virtual world. Feel the warm air, the texture of a flower or grab a glass of cold lemonade.  What if a surgeon using a robotic surgery device could feel the organs he was operating on, or an amputee that can feel again? What if it was possible to cut the rehabilitative time for stroke or accident victims in half? What if this technology can assist a soldier to run faster, walk longer and carry more gear. These and many other applications can be realized using the technology that we are working on today.

Herculean - Strength in Nanotechnology

Name: NanCogenics
Description:
COMPANY: Nancogenics (NCGI), a TX Corp., has successfully validated in preclinical studies a nanobiotechnology platform for the tumor-specific localization of cancer therapeutics, referred to as Magnetic Localization.  The Company is advancing the technology to the clinical path, with initial focus on a treatment modality for breast cancers, and is developing pharmaceutical and financial partnerships to assist in moving the program forward.

INNOVATION: The NCGI Co-Founders, in collaboration with a major Cancer Research Institution, has developed a novel tumor-specific targeting methodology, based on magnetic nanovectors, in which chemotherapeutic prodrug constructs coupled to superparamagnetic nanoparticles (MNP) deliver a therapeutic load to the tumor interstitial volume under the influence of external focused magnetic field gradients. The concept has been demonstrated in human tumor xenograft models.

In a breast cancer model, a significant anti-tumor response was demonstrated with MNP-Taxol prodrug constructs, while exhibiting little or no toxicity to normal tissue, and where treated mice remain free of cancer after over a year.

IMPACT:  A clear need exists for advanced treatment modalities such as this that allow the full potential of cytotoxic drugs to be realized, which include the oncoming challenges of the shift to localized therapy, being driven by new emerging classes of drugs.  Magnetic Localization represents the next generation of tumor-specific targeting.

Name: Graphene Technology
Description:
The Graphene Technology project produces graphene oxide (GO), graphene (reduced graphene oxide) and functionalized graphenes. Currently, the company has developed a cheap and scalable method for the synthesis of graphene oxide, registered as "know-how". The method allows to obtain high purity GO (the amount of impurities does not exceed 0.1 at.%), with a desired size of monolayer particles in the range of 500 nm – 100 μm. Also, scalable methods for the synthesis of the set of controllably functionalized graphenes were developed: aminated, brominated, carbonylated and carboxylated graphene derivatives. Synthesis modes with the maximum yield and technological schemes of production of the target products were worked out. Products are supplied in the form of dispersions (aqueous and organic), pastes, aerogels, films and papers. With production up to 1 kg per month, the price of a product is from $10 per 1 g. After the scaling up to 100 kg per month the price will be $2 per 1 g, and further switching to production capacities from 1000 kg per month will result in lowering of the price of GO will to be less than $0.2-0.3 per 1 g. The prices of functionalized graphenes range from $ 13 to $ 80 per 1 g, depending on the type of product, with a subsequent reduction in prices to $ 0.5-17 per 1 g of the selected product subject to scaling of production.
The produced materials are of a high interest for the applications in the electronic industry (touch screens, supercapacitors, sensors and microelectronic chips), composite materials industry (aerospace, medical implants, engineering materials), catalysis (carriers for hydrogen energy catalysts and other industries), R&D (startups, research institutes, private laboratories, R&D departments of innovative businesses from sectors above).

Blue Light Guard lenses are built on a proprietary lens technology which selectively and actively blocks artificial blue light radiation, and enhances the contrast between the digital monitor and the surrounding environment.
Digital Eye Strain (D.E.S.) is the physical discomfort felt after two or more hours of work in front of digital monitors and it is associated with artificial blue light emissions combined with the constant focus at close to mid-range distances. Electronic device monitors are emitting harmful artificial blue light which in time harms the quality of tear layers and contributes to early occurrence of certain eye damages and syndromes. Children are also at risk due to the growing use of digital devices. However, natural blue light is part of the visible light spectrum and it’s considered to be beneficial, since it helps to regulate our body’s biological clock, to trigger our body’s growth mechanism and it plays an important role for people to feel euphoria. While blue light normally triggers the creation of melatonin hormone, overexposure to artificial blue light sources, especially at the wrong times, can cause DES symptoms, insomnia and sleep cycle disruption.

Our research focuses on the photocatalytic generation of hydrogen, operando characterization of catalytic active sites, and the manufacturing of catalytic devices via 3D printing. We develop cutting-edge technologies for hydrogen and syngas production, explore catalytic membrane reactors, and work on exhaust gas treatment (CO and soot oxidation, methane abatement, etc.). Our expertise extends to nanoshaped nanoparticles, the physical chemistry of minerals, and CCUS technologies for industrial waste management. Our work also includes research on organic solar cells, pushing the boundaries of renewable energy solutions.

Name: TECHNO-CLS Project
Description: TECHNO-CLS project aims at the breakthrough in technologies needed for designing and practical realisation of novel gamma-ray Light Sources (LS) operating at photon energies from keV up to GeV range that can be constructed through exposure of oriented crystals (linear, bent and periodically bent) to the beams of ultra-relativistic charged particles. The TECHNO-CLS high-risk/high-gain science-towards-technology breakthrough research programme will address the physics of the processes accompanying the oriented crystal exposure to irradiation by the high-energy electron and positron beams at the atomistic level of detail needed for the realisation of the TECHNO-CLS goals. A broad interdisciplinary, international collaboration has been created previously in the frame of FP7 and H2020 projects, which performed initial experimental tests to demonstrate the crystalline undulator (CU) idea, production and characterisation of periodically bent crystals and the related theory. Additionally, by means of a pre-bunched beam a CU LS has a potential to generate coherent superradiant radiation with wavelengths orders of magnitudes less than 1 Angstrom, i.e. within the range that cannot be reached in existing LSs based on magnetic undulators. Such LSs will have many applications in the basic sciences including nuclear and solid-state physics and the life sciences. Theoretical, computational, experimental and technological results obtained in the course of this project will pave a way for key technological developments of the LSs and their wide exploitation. The TECHNO-CLS international collaboration possesses all the necessary expertise to successfully conduct the outlined programme.

Name: e-miRgency
Description:
Transforming Cancer Detection Through miRNA Technology
In the battle against cancer, early detection is the key to saving lives. Yet, for far too long, the limitations of existing detection methods have left us with critical challenges. Traditional approaches are often invasive, costly, and can miss the mark when it comes to detecting cancer at its earliest and most treatable stages.
Why miRNAs Matter:
This is where miRNAs step into the spotlight. MicroRNAs, abbreviated as miRNAs, are tiny but powerful molecules found within our cells. They hold immense promise as game-changing biomarkers for cancer detection. MicroRNAs (miRNAs) are tiny molecules with enormous potential. As biomarkers, they offer a new frontier in cancer detection and follow-up, providing precise insights into early-stage disease.
Our Mission:
At e-miRgency, we're pioneers in harnessing miRNA technology to revolutionize cancer diagnostics. Our solutions empower early intervention, and a brighter future.
Join the Fight:
Explore our website to see how we're reshaping cancer detection. Together, we can rewrite the narrative, offering hope and progress in the fight against cancer.

The equipment includes a nanoindenter, atomic force microscope (AFM), dynamic mechanical analyzer (DMA), rheometer, calorimeter, electrochemical impedance spectroscope, thermogravimetric balance, calorimeter, and melt flow indexer, among others.

The Polymer and Bionanomaterial Laboratory is directed by Dr. Fernando Torres. Its infrastructure is used to carry out top-level research, development, and innovation (R&D&I) projects, the results of which have been published in peer-reviewed and indexed journals (more than 100 papers). It also actively carries out responsibility projects in conjunction with the PUCP's Social Responsibility Department (DARS). It has a large group of researchers and active collaborators in Peru and abroad.

The services of the Polymer and Bionanomaterial Laboratory are aimed at other national and international laboratories, companies, industries, organizations, institutes, research groups, and the general public that require specialized services related to:

Sample processing and characterization of materials based on polymers, biopolymers, nanomaterials, plastics, among others.
Formulation of research, technological development, and innovation projects.
Analytical support for the development of research, technological development, and innovation projects.
Courses, training, and specialized technical consulting.
Possibility of collaborations with other national and international laboratories.

Nano LiquiTec is a scientific breakthrough. It is a refrigerant accelerator and synthetic catalyst engineered to solve a costly engineering problem called oil fouling. oil fouling occurs naturally in all cooling, heating, and refrigeration systems )no matter the size, age or climate) and causes detrimental loses in energy efficiency. This product creates colder vent air, saves energy (and cooling costs) at an average of 29%, reduces carbon emissions, acts as an eco-friendly lubricant, and reduces friction and wear for the life of the treated system. 

Our founding team, along with leading nanoscientists, engineers and industry experts developed Nano LiquiTec through the latest developments in nanoscience, a critical technology of the 21st century.

The product is manufactured in Germany, a global green superpower and leader in top quality technology and scientific developments. As a result, the proprietary and patent pending Nano LiquiTec technology is poised to be the world leader in its product space. 

Graphene has stimulated intense global interest as a known, superior thermal conductivity enhancer. Applying graphene, as a key element of Nano LiquiTec, confirms this breakthrough technology achieves higher efficiency gains, while establishing it as the most innovative in its field.

Whether an organization’s energy efficiency improving needs are commercial, industrial, residential, or in mobile refrigeration and the automotive industry, Nano LiquiTec works for every organization and industry sector.

Name: NanoEngineering - Technion
Description:
Our research is in the area of molecular engineering of soft matter, in particular the development of process-structure-property relationships, through the use of simulation and experiment, and the development of functional nano-structures, such as: electrospun fibers, thin films, beads etc.

Some of the group’s important contributions are:

Experimental study of the electrospinning process, including cone-like surfaces from which jets emerge, jet profiles, and stability of jet paths.
In-depth understanding of the fundamental physical facets of electrospinning of core-sheath systems and hollow micro-scale fibers.
Understanding the central role of the polymer nanofiber microstructure, i.e., supramolecular structures, which ultimately governs the unique mechanical and thermo-mechanical behavior of the nano-object products.
Helping to establish electrospinning of polymer nanofibers as a broad technology platform for applications in design of composite materials, drug delivery technologies, and in regenerative medicine.

- Biocompatibilité
- Résistance aux conditions extrêmes (température, pression)
- Fonctionnalisable (anticorps, biomarqueurs,...)

Les champs d'applications pour cette technologie sont variés:
- Sciences du vivant (marquage fluorescent, tracking in vivo, diagnotisque in vitro, recherche biomédicale...)

- Lutte contre la contrefaçon (marquage d'objets d'arts, luxe, ...)

La société DiamLite est actuellement à la recherche de nouveaux champs d'applications, ainsi que de nouveaux partenaires.

NikkoIA’s technology demonstrates similar performances as current InGaAs sensors for a lower cost, and enables the design of very large dimension sensors with pixels from very few to several hundred microns. Name: Adaptamat Ltd
Description:
Helsinki, Finland  based AdaptaMat Oy is the inventor and manufacturer of the single crystalline Magnetic Shape Memory (MSM) alloys. ( Sometimes called also FSMA - Ferromagnetic Shape Memory Alloy)

Magnetic Shape Memory (MSM) Alloy is a smart metal with several functional properties.  The best known property is its MSM effect i.e the material elongates (and contracts) 6% of it is length in proportional manner with the magnetic field strength. 

Besides this MSM effect, the alloy exhibits also several other useful properties such as proportional (with the length of it)  and variable resistance as well as proportional magnetization and permeability. 

Based on these special material properties range of MSM based devices and applications can be made, such as
1. MSM based actuators featuring high speed (< 1 ms rise time) proportional movements with built in self-sensing and  option for a proportionally-stable, no-power holding mode.
2. MSM based vibration energy harvesters exhibiting high power densities at low frequncies
3. Simple and reliable strain and displacement sensors 
4. MSM based pumps and dispensers 
5. High Temperature SMA materials

For more information please visit our web-site or get directly in touch by mailing adaptmat@adaptamat.com

Name: ACEworks
Description:
We develop atomic interactions based on the Atomic Cluster Expansion (ACE). ACE is a leading method for accurate and efficient parameterization of atomic interactions and can be employed in large-scale atomistic simulations on parallel CPU and GPU architectures. ACE models are trained using advanced machine learning algorithms to reproduce energies and forces of electronic structure calculations.

We are able to deliver complete atomistic simulation workflows for specific materials and applications, from the generation of comprehensive reference data to detailed analysis of simulation outcomes.

Transformando la filtración tradicional para Motores, de Micro filtración a Nano filtración e incorporando nuevos elementos, que hará INNECESARIO EL HABITUAL cambio de aceite, reducción de costos de mantenimiento y operativos entre el 35 y 50%, alargar y proteger la vida útil de los equipos en 50% y reducción del impacto ambiental en un 80 %.
Aportamos lo mejor que tenemos y sabemos, en función tus logros y reconocimientos.
TRABOLD su representada alemana ha obtenido entre muchos otros premios importantes, el galardón al invento “SIMPLEMENTE GENIAL”. Proyecto oficial de la Feria HANNOVER EXPO 2000 en Alemania, el premio ambiental más importante en Europa DEN CALWER en los años 1999 y 2001, PREMIO BID DE CALIDAD CATEGORIA ORO 2018, Certificado TIV de calidad en Europa y Premio Conciencia de Biosfera “JOSE CELESTINO MUTIS” 2010 en Colombia.
Como complemento a los filtros de aceite TRABOLD, ECONOTEC S.A.S ha incorporado a su portafolio, el filtro SEPAR FILTER  Alemán ,para combustible DIESEL, el cual, mediante un proceso de decantación por peso molecular y dos centrifugas inversas, más un elemento filtrante Hidrofóbico ( repele el agua)  retiene el 99,9% del agua y material particulado.

Name: Farotex
Description:
Farotex is the only company that offers a completely new method of metallisation of natural and synthetic fabrics as well as artificial leather with pure gold to create unique designs of clothing and accessories. The application of gold coatings onto fabrics of different colours and textures creates unique colour effects and provides for a wide range of design possibilities.

Farotex offers a wide range of applications of metallisation for natural and synthetic fabrics, non-wovens, artificial leather and polymeric films by ion-plasma (magnetron) deposition in a high vacuum environment.

Processing takes place in mild low temperature plasma conditions, allowing the materials to retain air and moisture permeability, drapability and material strength properties. The coating is resistant to dry and wet  friction, washing and dry cleaning. The coated materials can be sewn, glued and soldered.

Industrial magnetron sputtering equipment is used to metallise rolls of textiles, leather and polymer films with a thickness range of 12 microns – 7.5 mm and a width of 170 cm. Coatings of any type of metal or alloy can be applied, and layer thickness can be controlled to conserve metal or to obtain different levels of electroconductivity.

The metallised materials produced by this method are nontoxic and safe for humans, even at constant tactile contact, which allows the product to be used not only for technical purposes, but also in medicine, households and the textile industry.

Name: Team NanoScreen
Description:
Large glass windows in modern office buildings improve daytime illumination and enhance aesthetics, but they also let in huge amounts of heat. On a hot day, 30% of an office building's heat gain is through windows. Use of air conditioning to offset this results in huge electricity spendings. 

To solve this, we propose the development of NanoScreen - transparent polymer-based screen that would selectively block IR radiation while remaining fully transparent to visible light. This would ensure that the rooms within the building maximize natural lighting without heating up. 

With NanoScreen you get high heat rejection capabilities without compromising on the visible transparency therefore lowering the need for air conditioning. For a fraction of the cost we deliver you with an eco-friendly solution  providing comfortable working environment. 

Let’s save the planet, one NanoScreen at the time.

Can modify asphalt in PMA plants or insitu without the need for high shear pumps 
It's special design allows BitupreneTM 612 to dissolve in about half the time of any other SBS's or SBR's in use to today to modify asphalt.

Name: Ceramic Pro New Zealand
Description:
Ceramic Pro is a nano-ceramic protection system of the new generation, for the next generation. Our mission is two fold: we want to improve the lifespan of your assets, and we want to preserve the irreplaceable ecosystems here in Aotearoa New Zealand. We provide our customers with an alternative to harsh chemicals traditionally used to clean and protect their valuable goods. Our environmentally sustainable solutions will ensure your assets retain their brand new look and feel for years.

Essentially Ceramic Pro is a clear solid product that protects against ultraviolet rays and water damage, as well as daily wear and tear. Our products can be applied to a vast range of surfaces including cars, boats, aircrafts, construction and industrial objects and accessories.

Ceramic Pro coatings bond to surfaces at a molecular level, filling in any nano-pores and creating a hydrophobic surface that is impervious to contamination. This makes our products ideal for critical applications across all industries. No other product in the world performs quite like this! 

If you invest in the protection of your assets now, you will lower maintenance and replacement costs. This also helps to decrease the massive amount of waste generated each year and means you can reduce your ecological footprint.

WHY CHOOSE CERAMIC PRO? 

Ceramic Pro is not a paint protection, wax or sealant that will wash away or break down over time. It is a nano-ceramic coating that forms a permanent adhesion to the paint and can only be removed through abrasion. No chemical can dissolve the coating.
- Hardness above 9H: The glass coat is above 9H on the Pencil test scale. This scale is used in the coating industry to determine a mineral`s hardness, 9H is the highest on the scale.
- Super Gloss: The shine from this product is not comparable to any other product on the 
market. It has to be seen in real life.

Name: CerarMist
Description:
CerarMist products are the next generation in surface protectants.  A superior alternative to chemical solutions, CerarMist has been specially formulated for safe use on skin, fabrics, plants and other inanimate surfaces, including food contact surfaces.
Typical disinfecting processes use poisonous chemicals such as alcohols, bleaches and acids which are designed to target and destroy a microbe’s outer membrane resulting in a “chemical kill”. These antimicroial biocides are toxic compounds that are all harmful to humans, animals and plants.
When a surface is coated with CerarMist, millions of invisible, nanoscopic crystalline structures form and bond, effectively forming a new surface.   This newly modified surface is one that causes a “mechanical kill”  that prevents adhesion, disrupts microbial communication and prohibits colonization, reproduction and proliferation. 
CerarMist protected surfaces can ward off a wide variety of pathogenic microbial infections unlike chemical antimicrobial products that are both toxic and evaporate in mere seconds.

CerarMist Does More Than Disinfect – It Modifies The Surface.

Surface adhesion is the most critical step in microbial proliferation. Microbes survive and reproduce when able to adhere to a suitable surface.  When applied to a target surface, through surface modification, CerarMist protectants form a mineral-based, mechanically bonded, protective layer  that physically changes the surface. 
While undetectable to the naked eye and harmless to humans, CerarMist protectants turn previously suitable surfaces into inhospitable environments, incapable of supporting pathogenic microbial life.
CerarMist uses a unique mechanical defense approach that offers lasting protection.  CerarMist is always non-toxic and offers unlimited applications in the areas of healthcare, transportation, agriculture, hospitality, sports and public spaces.

There's a better way to clean, disinfect and protect what matters most...CerarMist.

Name: Accademia di Gagliato Globale
Description:
L’Accademia di Gagliato Globale (AGG) was founded on the principle that talent is universal, but opportunity is not. In a world that relies on science to solve our most complex problems, too many communities are cut off from the day-to-day workings of science and technology innovation and education. In such settings, adults and children alike often miss opportunities to learn and engage with science and technology, and scientists miss valuable chances to learn from lay people whose cultural and practical know-how could inform more beneficial innovations and solutions.

AGG seeks to close that opportunity and communication gap by supporting STEM (science, technology, engineering, and mathematics) professionals who return to their home communities as role models and ambassadors for STEM ingenuity. AGG members, called accademici, are charged with opening the door to the unlimited possibilities in STEM education and careers.

OUR MISSION

AGG encourages STEM professionals to become STEM philanthropists by developing events in their home communities that connect STEM experts and innovators with local community members.

* Inspire and engage young people through innovative educational programs on the frontier of science and technology
* Disseminate knowledge and basic competence on science and medical advances among a public of nonexperts
* Encourage collaborations, partnership and exchanges among scientists, business leaders, young researchers, innovators in all fields, and creative minds
* Offer a unique venue for in-depth discussions among global experts on novel solutions to unmet STEM challenges

Name: Nano-Micro Letters
Description: Impact Factor:12.264. Nano-Micro Letters is a peer-reviewed, international, interdisciplinary and open-access journal published under the SpringerOpen brand that focuses on science, experiments, engineering, technologies and applications of nano- or microscale structure and system in physics, chemistry, biology, material science, pharmacy and their expanding interfaces with at least one dimension ranging from a few sub-nanometers to a few hundreds of micrometers. Nano-Micro Letters ( "micro-nano Express") is an English academic journal founded by Shanghai Jiaotong University.Especially, emphasize the bottom-up approach in the length scale from nano to micro since the key for nanotechnology to reach industrial applications is to assemble, to modify, and to control nanostructure in micro scale. The aim is to provide a publishing platform crossing the boundaries, from nano to micro, and from science to technologies. Nano-Micro Letters publishes articles that focus on, but are not limited to, the following areas: - Synthesis, characterization, manipulation of nanomaterials - Quantum physics, nanoscale electrical transport - Nanoscale modeling and simulations - Microdevices based on nanomaterials or nanostructures - MEMS, NEMS - Nanosensors, Nanoelectronics, Nanomagnetics - Nano- or microfluids - Nanobiology, biotechnology, bioengineering - Nanomedicine - Solar cell based on nanostructures and nanomaterials - Applications related to nano- and micromaterials, devices, and systems

Name: FeMTo
Description: Artificial Intelligence (AI) within IoT devices requires an unprecedented amount of data flow and analysis. This is seriously challenging the conventional computation hardware in terms of speed and power consumption, especially if learning capability is required. Therefore, biologically inspired neuromorphic computing systems based on emerging memory devices, which combine storage and processing, are proposed as a viable solution. The FeMTo project works towards a neuromorphic network capable of performing AI tasks while operating at an extremely low power consumption in the order of fJ/bit. The research will include development of new ferroelectric memory devices as well as design of integrated circuits in order to bring neuromorphic computing to a level where proof-of-concept system demonstrates an ultra-low power operation without compromising the computational speed, accuracy, or learning capacity.

Name: O2 Grow
Description:
O2 Grow is the exclusive worldwide licensee for patented technology that significantly increases the level of dissolved oxygen in water. 

Bubblers and venturis are inefficient at raising the dissolved oxygen level (ppm) in water. In addition, this process will actually raise the water temperature to match the surrounding air. Bubblers and venturis simply "blow" air through the water. The O2 Grow patented nano bubble technology elevates the dissolved oxygen levels 50% more than bubblers through electrolysis without increasing the temperature of your water. The O2 Grow technology actually "manufactures" 100% pure oxygen.

It's well documented that oxygen is needed to help balance pH, prevent root disease and ultimately increase yield. Increased oxygen to the root zone has shown to increase the speed of plant growth, size of the root ball, number and size of flowers, and nutrient uptake.

O2 Grow is changing how the world waters plants!

 Los virus, las bacterias y los hongos, no solo el Covid-19, se replican y se propagan de manera incontrolable a través de múltiples formas, incluidas las superficies que tocamos, la ropa que usamos, los juguetes con los que juegan nuestros hijos y las sábanas donde dormimos.
Desarrollamos Nairo.Care para evitar esto.

Nairo.Care es un compuesto antimicrobiano que utiliza nanotecnología para eliminar eficazmente virus, bacterias y hongos de los productos y superficies cotidianas, manteniéndonos protegidos de las amenazas actuales y futuras al crear y mantener su acción antimicrobiana persistente y activa en el tiempo. 
Los productos y aplicaciones desarrolladas ofrecen protección a materiales plásticos como juguetes y contenedores, ropa, pinturas, revestimientos, textiles, autopartes, muebles, etc., brindando seguridad y resguardo duradero en aquello con lo que estamos constantemente en contacto, usamos o tocamos.

Name: Metalonix
Description:
Metalonix, Inc. is headquartered in Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania and is a technology company that specializes in conductive metallic inks.  The core technology we developed contains molecules comprised of metal atoms which are incorporated into an ink.  When this ink is heated to a low temperature (~100⁰C) it produces an actual base metal that has conductivity comparable to that of bulk metal.  For example, our silver ink has a conductivity of 10⁶ S/m.  Metalonix inks possess a low viscosity and convert at a low temperature allowing for the use of a variety of deposition methods, including inkjet printing, onto any substrate that can withstand 100⁰C.  

For more information on our technology, please contact Beth Vasy, Operations Manager at bvasy@metalonix.com or 412.268.3136.

Savings

Making use of cold water onlyalso contributes to household economies, as overall effectiveness of the cleaners is not affected by temperature.

Convenience, time and energy savings

When making use of NanoSilver Technology, cleaning is up to 50% - 70% faster and easier than any traditional cleaning methods . Besides, any already cleaned surfaces are much less susceptible to accumulating dirt, which
makes their cleaning both more effective and less frequent. Saved time and energy may therefore be well used for some other purpose.

Protecting natural environment

Paradoxically enough, the industry does not rate as the  largest polluter, but people’s households actually do. NanoSilver Technology offers a unique way for reducing a daily release of huge quantities of chemicals into the
environment, thus effectively protecting our ecosystem.

Name: Fryfresh Canada
Description:
Fryfresh Canada is a corporation committed solely for the sales and distribution of the Fryfresh device, a groundbreaking apparatus that is destined to redefine how the food industry approaches the process of deep-frying.

The patented device is certified as safe and non-toxic by the NSF, a non-profit organization dedicated to public safety and protection, and is authorized for sale by the Food and Drug Administration, or FDA.

The success of the Fryfresh device is attributed to a photo-catalytic nanotechnology that it utilizes to diminish oil breakdown at a molecular level, caused by oxidization, thereby prolonging its lifespan by as much as 150 percent. This allows establishment owners to reap substantial savings on both their cooking oil and oil disposal costs.

Furthermore, the reduction in oil breakdown allows for better heat transfer from oil to food, which ultimately provides for faster cooked foods and the shortening of cooking times by up to 25 percent. This subsequently cuts down on energy consumption by as much as 30 percent. A reduction in oil breakdown also enhances food flavor and lessens oil absorption by food items resulting in healthier eating.

The Fryfresh device is a recipient of the 2008 Kitchen Innovations (KI) Award, bestowed by the National Restaurant Association, for addressing the growing needs of food service operators and improving productivity and food safety.

Description:
Nano4Life España es la distribuidora de los mejores productos de nanotecnología para crear y suministrar al Mercado soluciones que son aplicadas a todas las superficies y proveen propiedades únicas.

Nanotecnología, es el estudio, desarrollo y manipulación de sistemas en escala nanométrica. “Nano” es un prefijo del Sistema Internacional de Unidades que viene del griego νάνος que significa enano, y corresponde a un factor 10^-9,  que aplicado a las unidades de longitud, corresponde a una millonésima parte de un milímetro es decir 1 Nanómetro.

La nanotecnología estudia la materia desde un nivel de resolución nanométrico entre 1 y 100 nanómetros aprox. Las partículas nanométricas de dióxido de silicio presentes  en NANO4LIFE miden aprox. 75 Nm. Hay que saber que un átomo mide menos de 1 nanómetro pero una molécula puede ser mayor.

En esta escala se observan propiedades físicas y químicas totalmente nuevas  que se rigen bajo las leyes de la Mecánica Cuántica , estas nuevas propiedades son las que los científicos aprovechan para crear nuevos materiales (nanomateriales) o dispositivos nanotecnológicos.

Las superficies tratas con nuestros productos obtienen los siguientes resultados:

· Fácil de limpiar
· Protección ultra hidrofobica y  oleofobica
· Ultra seco
· Larga protección a la suciedad

· Resiste formación de algas, musgos y hongos
· Permite que las superficies respiren100%
· Color neutral

· No altera la textura ni la apariencia de la superficie
· Tremenda resistencia a la fricción
· Fácil de aplicar

· Soporta altas temperaturas, hasta 450° C

Name: Cleanerglobe B.V.
Description:
CleanerGlobe B.V. is gewijd aan het verbeteren van het milieu. Met onze producten verminderen we het brandstofverbruik en de emissies van voertuigen. Ook het brandstofverbruik wordt verminderd en tegelijkertijd geld bespaard, met onze makkelijk te gebruiken brandstofadditief LESS.

Wat is less?
Less is een brandstofadditief gebaseerd op nano-technologie.
Less vermindert het brandstofverbruik, de uitstoot van
schadelijke stoffen en verhoogt de prestatie en levensduur van de motor.
 
Waarom werkt Less?
Less werkt, omdat Less het verbrandingsproces beinvloedt.
daardoor werkt de motor efficiënter, goedkoper en schoner.
Wat is nano-technologie? Nano-technologie is technologie op het aller kleinste niveau.
 
Waarom gebruikt niet iedereen Less?
Less is in Azië al een groot succes. In Amerika concurreert Less fors met andere minderwaardige brandstof additieven. In China heeft de overheid besloten om Less in alle brandstoffen toe te voegen, en is er zelfs een fabriek geopend. in Europa groeit het aantal gebruikers. U heeft toch ook intresse?
 
Wat heeft Less wat anderen niet hebben?
Weinig additieven werken voor elk type motor. Oud en jong,
benzine en dieselmotoren. Bovendien heeft Less een door de
Nederlandse organistatie voor Toegepast Natuurwetenschappelijk Onderzoek aangetoonde werking.
 
Wie zijn er nog meer behalve Less?
De grote brandstofmaatschappijen hebben hun eigen dure
benzines met een reeds toegevoegd additief. Echter de werking is niet bekend.

Is er bewijs?
Ja. Het is bewezen dat Less werkt. De Nederlandse organistatie voor Toegepast Natuurwetenschappelijk Onderzoek heeft Less een jaar lang gemonitord samen met professionals uit de tansportbranche.

Description: NanoTech Sciences has developed a revolutionary disruptive patent-pending Technology that creates a high-performance carbon nanotube-polymer composite super material that is stronger, lighter, & more durable than any thermoplastic currently known. As a result of our new approach for combining carbon nanotubes (CNT) with almost any form of a polymer, which creates what is known as a composite matrix, we have accomplished our mission. A key challenge in preparing CNT polymer composites lies in the effective uniform dispersion and alignment of the CNTs within the polymer matrix and our successful resolution of this challenge is the foundation of NanoTech Sciences patent-pending technology. Our goal is the advancement of material science involving CNT polymer composites. Thermoplastics currently represent approximately 80% of all plastics consumed in the world today but further advancement of the use of these materials is restricted due to limitations in strength, weight, and cost of production. The major value proposition for the plastics industry is that NanoTech’s technology increases strength by a minimum of ten(10) times existing thermoplastics and for similar strengths, it reduces weight by a minimum of ten to thirty percent (10-30%). Finally, the economics reflect a reduction in both the costs of raw materials and production.

Name: Qbitrex
Description:
This is a new hi-tech startup located on the Sunshine Coast in Queensland Australia in the field of Quantum Computing using Photonic Circuits. It's an idea I've been working on for ten years.

At present all I've got is some simple electronic circuits and some out of the box concepts on how to achieve a real quantum computing device,

The basic business plan is to emulate the leader in this field Dwave, they can be the Coke and Qbitrex can be the  Pepsi.

I update the website daily to document the recent breakthrough in data entry via conventional digital circuits.

I am currently researching methods to change the electronic data that would arrive from the internet and be sent to registers ready for translation into photons. The two input data streams called Alice and Bob then are converted from chopped laser pulses to single photons and allowed to constructively and destructively interfer in the Quantum Nanotech ALU (Arithmetic Logic Unit) where they will be output as a non Hermit-Gausian interrence fractal pattern through the top face of a square prism unstable resonant cavity device built from a solid laser such as a YAG slice 1 wavelength thick sandwiched between optical glass and pumped by adjacent side face emitting single photon emitting diode lasers.

You've got to know string theory to understand the principles involved.

Description:
The company ADR System develops and produces electromagnetic field (EMF) shielding products in many forms such as textiles, films, cardboard, paint, packaging and ceramics.

ADR Technology uses a unique shielding method which has been engineered to obtain a high dielectric loss material, which does not require grounding. The technology which the products are created with is protected by a patent.

These multiphase systems are a modern approach to the design of EMR screens. This is so because careful selection of the types of component phases of the composite, their volumetric ratio and the way the phases are interconnected mean that it can be tailored to absorb specific frequency ranges with specific screening efficiencies.

Based on:

Analysis of the influence of the component phases’ properties, its architecture and the role of pore size effects of the dispersed phases on the screening frequency range and screening efficiency.
Analysis of the most modern types of EMF screening materials [2009: Composite Sci. Technol. 69(2009)358, J. Mater. Sci. 44(2009)3917, J. Phys. D 42(2009)155408; 2011: J. Condens. Matter Phys. 1(2011)55, J. Adv. Diel. 1(2011)389, Nanoscale Res. Lett. 6(2011)137, Adv. Mater. Lett. 2(2011)249; 2012: J. Appl. Phys.112(2012)034107; 2013: Progress Mater. Sci. 58(2013)183)] 
I can certify that the EMF solution by ADRTECHNOLOGY used in five kinds of screens is original and innovative.

ADRTECHNOLOGY IN THE CONSTRUCTION INDUSTRY
ADRTEX screens:

They can be integrated into preliminary coverage membranes (MWK- roofing screen 165, energy screen 185, roofing screen 215, wool screen 265), vapor permeable films (FWK- roofing films ML90, ML 130 and roofing film MSL 98) and vapor barrier films by MARMA POLSKIE FOLIE and roofing membrane solutions.

Name: IB Labs
Description:
IB Labs is a high-tech company in the field of nano-machining and failure analysis.

Specifically focused on real-time control and automation, IB Labs combines sample treatment and analytical techniques into a single, seamless technology. IB Labs introduces an entirely new concept of in-situ surface preparation for physical and electrical failure analysis and imaging.

IB Labs’ solutions are based on its Integrated Beam core technology for site-specific real-time controlled planar de-layering at both wafer and chip levels.  Integrated Beam Unit (IBU) is a next-generation Surface Micro-machining platform for Yield Engineering and Failure Analysis. With its open-concept modular design, it is fully customizable.  It is configurable as a stand-alone or it is integrated into existing Scanning Electron Microscopes, Mass- or Raman-spectrometers or other tools. IBU combines pioneering technology with a unique turn-key approach for in-situ ion-milling and imaging, 2D-to-3D image reconstruction, real-time controlled sample preparation for SEM and TEM, and Materials Analysis at the nano-scale.

IB Labs is an international company with teams in North America and Europe.

Additional information can be found at www.ibeamlabs.com

Name: Atomnaut
Description:
Atomnaut provides a 'Human Genome Project' for materials (silicon, steel, tungsten etc.).

What do longer-lasting batteries, practical quantum computers and higher-efficiency solar energy all have in common? New materials & manufacturing processes will make them a reality. 

Considering the impact, materials engineering is unacceptably slow and expensive -- 20 years to develop a new material for automotive or aerospace; semiconductor R&D cost $64 billion in 2014, equivalent to Google's annual revenue.

The problem is missing data. Data that describes how atoms control a materials properties. Without it, engineers can't rely on computer models. Slow and expensive trial-and-error experiments must be used.

"without a clear understanding of the structural evolution of a material, it is virtually impossible to make quantitative computational predictions" 2016 Urban et al., Nature Comp. Mat.

Atomnaut completes the picture. Using new imaging technology, every atom - the 3D position and element identity - can be mapped for the first time, a 100x improvement. 

Reading this data is reading a material's 'blueprint' or 'DNA'. The data unlocks replacing experiments with computers. New patentable materials and manufacturing processes can be calculated. The Human Genome Project cost $3 billion and returned $500 billion in the first 10 years – a 180x return.

Atomnaut provides:
1. Materials characterization services.
2. Data analytics for design of patentable materials and manufacturing processes.
3. Access to a library of 3D atomic structures, Encyclopedia Atomica.

Think small to think big
http://atomnaut.com

The objective of Goldemar is to commercialize gold clusters for air purification, emissions / odor control and volatile  compounds elimination. 

The technological base of Goldemar is the high catalytic activity of gold nanoclusters at room temperature.
The rationale behind the creation of the company is the breakthrough development of a synthetic process that allows for the simple, economic and scalable synthesis of these gold clusters. The process to obtain the clusters and the potential applications are protected by a patent.

The room temperature catalytic activity of gold clusters is interesting for many industrial applications such as oxidation of CO from vehicle emissions, oxidation of volatile organic compounds (VOC) or the oxidation of odor related chemicals. First contacts with potential customers have shown that the technology is not only desired but also achievable at a cost that makes the company economically viable. Goldemar wants to focus on the customer needs and develop and provide them with the best technological solutions.

Name: Upstream Technology Platform PTA
Description: Located at the heart of Grenoble's Minatec campus, the PTA upstream technology platform is a clean room dedicated to micro- and nano-fabrication. These services range from the production of technological building blocks to complete manufacturing processes for prototype components. Name: Jet Process Corporation
Description:
Jet Process Corporation (JPC) is a privately held thin film deposition service founded in 1991, and is the sole owner and developer of the versatile Jet Vapor Deposition (JVD) process for thin film solders and other thin film metal coatings. 

We specialize in the deposition of lead free solders; these include eutectic and off-eutectic Gold-Tin, the Tin-Silver-Copper family, Indium and Indium alloys, and virtually all other lead free solder alloys.  We also deposit related adhesion layers and diffusion barriers such as TiPtAu and TiNiAu.

JVD's low temperature and low vacuum operating conditions are compatible with photoresist patterned wafers, heat sensitive substrates, and mask materials, including materials which outgas.  

JVD technology enables innovative and otherwise unavailable solutions for advanced technology applications such as semiconductor packaging, MEMS, microelectronics, optoelectronics, photonics, telecomm, microwave devices, advanced sensors, biomedical, aerospace, etc.

JVD's low temperature, low vacuum operating conditions provide high rate deposition, high utilization of source material, and is a clean, environmentally sound operation that offers many advantages over competing thin film metalizing techniques such as sputtering, evaporation, CVD and electroplating, and has demonstrated its versatility in a wide variety of contract R&D and production work.  JVD is an economical, safe, clean and environmentally sound process.  

In addition to our solder specialty, we have a recent and growing program in deposition of Platinum nanocluster films with high surface areas, for biomedical and other uses.

Name: NFFA-DI
Description: NFFA-DI is the NFFA upgrade proposal for realizing a Full-Spectrum Research Infrastructure for nanoscience and nanotechnology, capable of enhancing the Italian research competitiveness on the fundamental interactions of multi-atomic matter to explore the origins of materials behaviour at all relevant dimensional and temporal scales, to describe, understand and design material solutions for engineering innovation. The rationale of NFFA-DI is to integrate nanofoundry laboratories, i.e. facilities for atomically controlled growth, structural characterization of nano-objects and nano-structured materials, including upscaling the most promising systems to the level of intermediate TRL developments, and the experimental facilities for the fine analysis of matter using synchrotron radiation (at Elettra), therefore raising the quality, reproducibility and overall competitiveness of Italian research in nanoscience, and full integration within the European RI ESFRI landscape. NFFA-DI creates a unique environment for basic nanoscience and advanced technologies, bridging the gap between fundamental research on quantum matter and functional micro- systems for the digital transformation. The upgrade will enable frontier research projects by users, enhancing the scientific competences and productivity of all nodes, along with the continuous upgrade of the RI. Mission oriented research at EC level and NRRP Centres and Partnerships will also exploit access to NFFA-DI. The combined digital access to a wide portfolio of services through a Single-Entry Point and Catalogue of state-of-the-art experimental and computational resources and FAIR-data services covers the whole value chain from material discovery to industrial technology transfer. It will become a reference RI in Europe, with huge potential for the acceleration of the digital transformation of research and society. Co-location with synergic NPRR initiatives will enhance the overall impact.

Name: Holox Technologies
Description:
Holox Technologies has developed a revolutionary computer-programmable holographic method to create efficient, rugged, low-cost 3D optical films that stands ready to cut LCD power consumption by over 50% and create new less-expensive platforms for solar photovoltaic energy generation.

These films, which combine many optical functions in one thin layer, offer performance and cost advantages in backlit displays for cell phones, mobile devices, TVs, monitors, and laptops plus heads-up displays, flexible screens, and digital signage. A cell phone will be thinner, have 25-50% more battery life, use fewer LEDs, have lower cost and yet higher brightness. TV power consumption will be cut by more than 100W.

The films can also be designed to concentrate solar energy without tracking motors, combine several optical elements into one, and even split wavelengths to efficiently beam light to horizontal multi-junction cells.  The efficient tracking and spectral separation possible with Holox films enable potential break-through efficiencies over 50% with a dramatically lower cost-per-watt that is competitive with fossil fuel power generation. 

The Holox mastering process is computer generated so application-specific films can be rapidly created for particular display or solar specifications and sizes and will be optimized for desired tradeoffs of energy, cost, brightness, thinness, and wavelengths.

The patented Holox FringeWriterTM mastering tool is also the only platform that enables fast programming and writing of 3D masters for nano-imprint lithography manufacturing.

We focus on so called nanometrology components, which is defined by equipment having an upper boundary in (volumetric) uncertainty of 0,3 micrometer. A good example is our Gannen-XP probe, which is the most accurate 3D probe commercially available.

Secondly, we develop custom metrology solutions for a wide range of customers, e.g. (metrology) institutes, universities, high-tech industry and manufacturers of metrology equipment. Projects usually are a combination of precision engineering and metrology / sensors / measurements. 

Founded end of 2007 as a spinoff from Eindhoven University of Technology, we have a strong engineering background with a highly skilled and trained staff. We’re passionate about metrology and precision engineering and strive to keep pushing the boundaries in this field!

Name: Nappar Technologies
Description:
Nanometals, are the fabric of numerous cutting-edge technological breakthroughs, as their large surface encapsulated in a tiny space enable hyperconductivity and catalyzer properties. However, the existing highly fragmented supply chain of Nanometals, is showing signs of strain, with limitations in production capacity, scalability, and technological innovation. Current players are only able to cope with ~2 million metric tons of nanoparticles per year, supply that will need to at least DOUBLE by 2030 to match the upcoming advancements in the field of electronics, healthcare and renewable energies.

The production value chain dynamics are also broken, as:

1. It’s hard for the Research Labs to come closer to large enterprises to close the production gap
2. R&D departments from industry leaders (Nvidia in electronics or Pfizer in Pharma) directly buy the raw metal (e.g., copper) to later produce nanometals incurring in several operational and cost inefficiencies along the way
3. Current Nanometal specialists are left serving mid-tier companies

Our startup is poised to fill this gap by leveraging cutting-edge production technologies and scalable processes to ensure a reliable, high-quality supply of nanoparticles, driving forward the innovations required for future advancements.

We have developed a a proprietary and cost-effective physical process to uniquely generate spherical nanoparticles of any size and purity. Our solution delivers:

1. 40% cost reduction in the end product
2. Higher stability of nanoparticles, avoiding reaction with oxygen and sulfurs
3. Customization of any size and purity to meet industry-specific needs

If you are excited about our mission, please reach out!

Name: QSENSE - PRIN 2022
Description:
QSENSE is a PRIN 2022 project, funded by the Italian Ministry MUR, gathering an interdisciplinary team of experts in the fields of photonics, materials science, computational physics and spectroscopic sensing from three research units: Politecnico di Milano, Università degli Studi Roma Tre and Università di Pisa, in collaboration with Sapienza Università di Roma.

The QSENSE project targets the demonstration of novel architectures for photonics integrated circuits (PIC) sensing chips operating in the Mid-infrared (MIR), where molecules display their unique spectral fingerprints, fabricated from SiGe layers epitaxially grown on a Si wafer. The chips will then host waveguides with an optical sensing region, where the analytes will interact with the evanescent filed of the guided mode, and an integrated quantum well infrared photodetector (QWIP). 

The final goal is the development of a sensing platform for the detection of the spectral fingerprint of a large class of analytes, including methane (CH4). Nevertheless, the impact of the proposed technology is not limited to environmental monitoring but can promote disruptive advances also in healthcare and safety & security, by replacing bulky, expensive, sophisticated MIR spectroscopy systems.

Underlying concept is to eliminate the main bottleneck: the necessity for converting optical signals - to electrical, and reverting them back to optical signal, for amplifying, multiplexing / de-multiplexing, packets switching and packet's data processing, when transmitting over the fiber-optic communication lines (FOCL) infrastructure. Name: FractalMaterials LLC
Description:
FractalMaterials offers unique products based on Nanoporous Anodic Aluminum Oxide (AAO).

AAO is a self-organized ceramic material with a honeycomb-like structure formed by arrays of uniform and parallel nanopores (pores with diameters of 5-500 nm)  and lengths from a few tens of nanometers to few hundred micrometers. Highly ordered AAO is formed spontaneously by electrochemical oxidation (anodization) of aluminum in certain acidic solutions.

The utility of AAO in science and technology is enabled by its structure and chemistry which can be controllably engineered at the nanoscale over very large areas and in practical formats. FractalMaterials has developed a unique fabrication method that allows for rapid prototyping of a wide variety of macroscopic shapes with well defined nanoprous structures.

Name: RVS Danmark
Description:
RVS Danmark er forhandler af RVS Technologyfor det Danske markedet, med hovedsæde i Silkeborg.

Besøg os og læs dybtegående om Rvs på https://www.rvsdanmark.dk eller læs videre.

RVS er en revolutionerende teknologi der tilbyder en øjeblikkelig og nem mulighed for at reducere brændstofforbrug, slid og CO2 udledning kraftigt, til glæde for bundlinjen og naturen. 

Teknologien bruges af selskaber og private der gerne vil spare på, brændstofforbrug, olieforbrug, og omkostninger til motorrenovering samt vedligehold. Vi mener at den største udfordring i transport-, produktions- og entreprenørbrancherne, er at skabe solide besparelser på brændstof og reparationer, som også gavner miljøet. Derfor er RVS revolutionerende for hele verden.

RVS er blevet testet og anerkendte af førende institutter og forskningscentre bla:

TÜV: Tüv er et verdens førende test institutter i verden med mere end 150 års erfaring.
Fraunhofer institut: Fraunhofer er den største forskningsorganisation for anvendt forskning i Europa.
TUM: Det Tekniske Universitet i München,, anses for et af de mest velansete universiteter i Tyskland.

Nogle af fordelene:

- Gendanner motoreffekten til som da den var ny
- Sparer op til 5,6% på brændstof (TÜV)
- Gendanner kompression i alle cylindre op til 20%
- Forøget motor levetid op til 50%
- Mindsker CO2 udledning 10-40%
- Effekterne fra RVS holder 100.000 km.
- Fjerner de negative følger af koldstart
- Fjerner og renser for alle urenheder der har ophobet sig i motoren

Der er ingen negative følger, og RVS ændre intet ved oliens egenskaber
Alt er dokumenteret af Europas førende testinstitutter.

2018
I dag arbejdes der på 4 generations produktet, som skal gøre anvendeligheden endnu mere effektiv, og skabe endnu flere besparelser. RVS bliver i dag brugt i hele verden. Lastbiler, busser, biler, fly, vindmøller, færger, både, våben og industrielt produktionsudstyr osv.

Læs mere om RVS på https://www.rvsdanmark.dk vi håber du vil se mulighederne for bundlinjen og naturen.

Dbh RVS teamet

Description:
The SmartCoDur project aims to research and develop innovative solutions that contribute to increasing the durability of concrete structures reinforced with shape memory steel (Fe-SMA). The research focuses on the design of new smart and sustainable coatings that are capable of self-regulating and repairing themselves when their surface films are damaged.

This approach represents a promising alternative for significantly extending the useful life of infrastructure, reducing maintenance costs and minimising energy consumption throughout its life cycle. At the same time, SmartCoDur is aligned with the principles of sustainability and environmental respect, offering advanced technological solutions that respond to the current challenges of durability, efficiency and ecological responsibility in the construction sector.

Name: NANO inzeniring d.o.o.
Description:
Our vision is to find and provide the best possible products based on innovative nanotehnology and offered them to our customers in whole Balkan region. 

In April 2015 we became an official exclusive distributor of the brand NANOPROTECH for Balkan region. 
NANOPROTECH manufactures the best anticorrosion, lubricants and electrical insulation coatings on the market today. 

Using nanotechnology that outperforms simple oils and PTFE (Teflon), NANOPROTECH displaces 100% of moisture within seconds and forms a durable 2-3 micron coating that is invisible and flexible. NANOPROTECH continues to perform even when the protected object is submerged in salt water and chlorinated water. 
The protective  coating is functional in temperatures ranging from 112° to +320° F (-80° to +160° C), and maintains full protection against corrosion and oxidation even when applied to wires that carry up to 100,000 volts.

With these products, we operate in retail and industry sectors.

Hood & Filter is the only self cleaning hood system that eliminates grease on the front, back and inside of the filters; the plenum, the entire duct work system and up through the exhaust fan. Hood & Filter changes any commercial vent hood system into a self cleaning hood.


MAC is another nanosystem created through Particles, P&N's maintenance automation and control services product. As a simple additive, a single ounce of MAC added to any cleaning solution eliminates over a dozen issues that all restaurants have, without the restaurant having to do virtually anything different. One of its greatest assets is fruit fly and gnat control. It is not an insecticide, it actually does nothing to the pest. What it does is affect the odor molecules that comes from food and drinks, in such a way that pests cannot detect the presence of food. Fruit flies and gnats cannot smell food within the facility, and because of that, they leave. The results are shocking.

Description:
Ing. Josef Vysoký - regionální manažer
+420 734 234 003  |  josef.vysoky@aerotec.cz
________________________________________________

AEROTEC je obchodní značka extrémně výkonných maziv založených na přísadě AEROTEC Metal Conditioner. Tyto produkty snižují tření kov – kov a s tím související nežádoucí efekty – opotřebení dílů, zvyšování teploty, hlučnost atd. Produkty AEROTEC dlouhodobě konzervují kovové povrchy, chrání proti korozi, odpuzují vodu, a tím prodlužují životnost strojů, ložisek a kovových dílů.

V kategorii maziv patří produkty AEROTEC mezi jedny z nejvýkonnějších produktů na trhu s prokazatelným testováním. Produkty AEROTEC obsahující složku AEROTEC Metal Conditioner pomáhají v průmyslu i v domácnostech, všude tam, kde je potřeba mazat a chránit kovy před nežádoucím třením. Jedinečná technologie založená na dlouhodobé ochraně mikromolekulárním filmem prodlužuje životnost strojů, technických celků a ulehčuje život těm, kteří se o ně starají.

Misí AEROTEC GROUP a.s. je usnadňovat život a práci jednotlivcům i průmyslovým podnikům. Pomáháme jim prodlužovat životnost kovových komponentů a strojů, spořit prostředky a energie, zvyšovat spolehlivost provozu.

Toho dosahujeme výrobou a prodejem extrémně výkonných maziv, která zásadně pomáhají redukovat tření kov – kov a vysoce efektivně řeší i široké spektrum problémů namáhaných kovů.

Name: GraBBIng
Description:

2D GRAphene-Based devices for BiosensING cancer biomarkers.
GraBBIng will study advanced 2D-materials with the purpose of personalized medicine, which is a huge topic in the European Union (EU) and globally. Precision medicine relies on validated biomarkers with which to better classify patients by their probable disease risk, prognosis and/or response to treatment. In particular, GraBBIng will focus on: Increasing the early diagnosis of lung cancer in Europe: considered an essential milestone to tackle the biggest cancer killer. 
The project will be carried out mainly at: the School of Materials Science and Engineering, Graphene Research Group-UNSW Team Graphene, Australia. And, the Nanobiosensors and Bioanalytical Applications Group, Catalan Institute of Nanoscience and Nanotechnology (ICN2) in Barcelona, Spain.

Name: Advanced Sterilization Pros LLC
Description:
We are a Phoenix-based company and our method of targeting microbial enemies creates an entirely new approach to surface sterilization for your home or business.
Our organic antimicrobial coating consists of a patented EPA registered component and has the following advantages:   
	Last on surface up to 90+ Days
	Non-Toxic, colorless, and odorless
	Safe on any surface
	Long lasting and cost effective
	Non-Corrosive
	Requires no dwell time
	NSF51 food contact safe
Our antimicrobial coating is a multi-layer, 18-link carbon chain with a positively charged nitrogen atom at its base. The first layer adheres itself to the surface it is applied to, while the upper layers effectively set-up a positively charged “bed of nails” that attracts microbes to its surface and then simultaneously pierces and electrocutes them on contact. Removal of the dead microbes is as easy as wiping the surface with water.
Our “mechanical kill” method differs greatly from the old, traditional ammonia and bleach-based disinfectants that work by poisoning the microbes wherever the disinfectant is applied with no long-term protection.   
We service both home and commercial properties.  Commercial sales and distribution available upon request.

Name: Xtreme Coating Brasil
Description:
A Xtreme Coating Brasil é uma empresa startup de importação criada em Setembro de 2017.
Atualmente fechou uma parceria de exclusividade e representação em todo território Nacional com a empresa Element119 dos Estados Unidos.
A Xtreme Coating Brasil atualmente conta com aproximadamente 30 parceiros em todo Brasil e conta com um grande programa de expansão de suas atividades na parte de Marketing e Operações, disponibilizando treinamentos e produtos para todos os parceiros.
A Element 119 originalmente começou suas atividades em Connecticut – EUA em 2010 como uma empresa especialista em  R&D (pesquisa e desenvolvimento) de coatings para a indústria aeroespacial. 
Os revestimentos foram desenvolvidos para empresas como Sikorsky, Bomardier, e também para companhias aéreas internacionais. Clientes deste calibre demandaram inovações de ponta para enfrentar os desafios únicos encontrados, e a empresa certamente conseguiu atender.
Um destes desafios foi a necessidade da Sikorsky de um coating que facilitasse a limpeza, pudesse ser aplicado manualmente e que pudesse proteger a pintura dos helicópteros na região do escape. 
A linha System X foi desenvolvida com este propósito, e obteve um desempenho muito superior ao esperado com certificação 9H da SGS e Boeing.
Mais de sete anos e bilhões de dólares em veículos protegidos, Element119 está atualmente representada em 20 países e crescendo. Este sucesso se dá graças ao relacionamento íntimo com parceiros de distribuição e de instalação da linha System X no mundo todo.
A empresa contínua fiel a sua missão, focada em entregar o que há de melhor, mais eficiente e a tecnologia de coating mais duradoura do mundo. Todos os coatings cerâmicos da linha System X são fabricados nas instalações em Thomastson CT – EUA atendendo aos mais altos padrões de qualidade.
