Name: Ozone Sanitech Ltd
Description:
We are proud to launch our new santation service and Ozone technology in the UK.

In the current Covid-19 climate, we wanted to offer a better alternative to fogging, which uses harmful chemicals.

Ozone protects our planet from harmful radiation and it can be man made on earth as well, by using Ozone generators which create a corona discharge.  An extra O molecule is added to O2 which naturally latch on to bacteria and viruses and break them down. 

Ozone breaks down bacteria cells and virus membranes at the nanometer level safely and chemically free. 30 minutes to 2 hours after treatment, the air naturally returns back to O2 (breathable air). 

This service is the most effective way to sanitise, disinfect and remove odours from buildings. Both airbourne (Aerosols) and surfaces are treated at the same time, allowing for whole buildings to be treated in a matter of hours.

To find out more, please visit our website or call to find out how we can assist.

Nos revêtements offrent une protection contre le vieillissement des matériaux, tandis que l'aspect d'origine reste structurellement garanti. Ils ne laissent donc aucun éclat ni couleur différente.
Les revêtements peuvent être appliqués sur presque tous les substrats souhaités et sont utilisés pour les applications les plus diverses. En plus de protéger presque tout  type de surfaces, Perfect Eco Clean Sarl offre également des services aux particuliers et aux entreprises. Soit pour maintenir la propreté des véhicules, des salles de travail et / ou de douche, soit pour l'entretien fréquent du verre et de la peinture.
En fait, toute prestation de revêtement Nano nécessite un nettoyage en profondeur préalable de la surface à traiter. C’est ainsi que nous avons travaillé avec nos partenaires pour mettre en place des solutions complètent pour la satisfaction des besoins de nos clients en nettoyage.
Nous avons trouvé que la combinaison du nettoyage et du revêtement était parfaite pour garder nos clients heureux également. De cette façon, la surface traitée aura une durée de vie plus longue selon la solution choisie et elle conservera son apparence soignée.
En adoptant  nos services, il est possible pour les entreprises, mais aussi pour les particuliers, d'économiser sur les coûts de maintenance actuels de propreté.

Name: Taqyon Quantum Materials Corp.
Description:
About Us

Taqyon Quantum Materials Corp, headquartered in Lewes, Delaware, is a pioneering force in advanced nanomaterials since our founding in 2019. We specialize in delivering transformative solutions for thermal management and sustainable energy through cutting-edge nanotechnology. Our innovative coatings and resins redefine efficiency, durability, and environmental impact, empowering industries worldwide. Our mission is to drive the adoption of next-generation materials that address pressing global challenges—from superior thermal insulation to scalable clean energy systems.

Our Products: 

1. Sprayable Thermal Barrier Coating 
- A revolutionary, non-brittle alternative to traditional ceramics.
- Exceptional thermal conductivity of 0.0067 W/m·K² at just 10 mils (0.25 mm) thickness.
- Delivers an outstanding U-factor for insulation, perfect for aerospace, automotive, industrial, and construction applications.
- Easy-to-apply sprayable formulation enhances versatility without compromising performance.

2. Thermally Conductive Coating for Electronics 
- Designed for high-performance electronics, boasting a thermal conductivity of 5 W/m·K² and faster.
- Ensures efficient heat dissipation, boosting device reliability and lifespan.
- Ideal for semiconductors, LEDs, electric vehicles, and advanced computing systems.

3. Thermally Conductive Geothermal Resin 
- A groundbreaking resin that expands geothermal energy potential to 98% of the Earth’s surface, compared to the current 2% feasibility.
- Optimizes heat transfer efficiency, enabling geothermal electric systems in diverse geological conditions.
- Powers the shift toward sustainable, renewable energy worldwide.

Industries We Serve:

- Aerospace & Defense
- Electronics & Semiconductors
- Automotive & Electric Vehicles
- Renewable Energy
- Construction

Name: A Nano Co
Description:
In very simple terms, we take samples of existing products (foods, liquids, vitamins, powders, fertilizers, detergents, pesticides, etc.) and break them down to nanosized versions of themselves. The effectiveness of the resulting nanoformula is usually 100-200x their normal bioavailability while the core formula remains the same.

In pharmacology, bioavailability is a subcategory of absorption and is the fraction (%) of an administered nutrient that reaches the system.

Name: Favored Coating Solutions

Favored Coating Solutions

Jiangsu Favored Nanotechnology Co., Ltd. (“Favored”, Stock Code: 688371.SH, Shanghai Stock Exchange) is a leading provider of high-performance, multi-functional, and customized nano-scale coating solutions. Specializing in advanced surface protection technologies, Favored develops nano-scale coatings with properties such as hydrophobicity, oil repellency, salt spray resistance, anti-vulcanization, anti-corrosion, transparent hardening scratch-resistance, and high-voltage insulation. In addition to innovative nano coating products, Favored offers specialized coating services for electronic devices and components, ensuring superior performance and reliability in demanding environments.

Favored’s nano coatings are widely applied across industries including consumer electronics, automotive, drones, LED lighting, industrial control systems, and more. The company collaborates with industry-leading enterprises and continues to expand its market applications in medical devices, immersion cooling systems, and other advanced technology sectors. By integrating cutting-edge nano-scale coating technology into diverse fields, Favored contributes to enhancing product durability, performance, and customer experience in high-tech applications worldwide.

Door deze service te hanteren bespaard het voor u en/of uw bedrijf kosten en tijd.

Door onderzoek van stichting Swow en verzekeringsmaatschappijen staat "slechte weersomstandigheden" als oorzaak in de top 3 van de meest voorkomende verkeersongelukken. Met slecht zicht hebben verkeersdeelnemers beperkt zicht, waardoor er vaak inschattingsfouten worden gemaakt; waaronder de wel bekende "kettingbotsingen".

Door onze hoogwaardige Nano coating heeft u glashelder zicht tijdens regen, hagel en sneeuw overdag en 's-avonds. 

Vergeleken met andere coating producten hecht onze coating tot wel 7 maanden. 
Hierdoor rijd u en /of uw personeel veel ontspannender achter het stuur in slechte weersomstandigheden.

Name: NanoAce Philippines
Description:
Everybody loves a clean home, but many of the chemicals found in household cleaners are not very safe to breathe, no matter how nice they may smell. Artificial perfumes can attribute to, and irritate existing allergies and reactions. Poor air quality in the home can lead to difficult breathing and serious lung conditions, such as; asthma, allergies, and chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD). Poor air quality can have effects on the heart as well, leading to angina, arrhythmia, heart attack, heart failure, along with hypertension. The poor quality of the air you breathe may even be a cause of stroke. Specific diseases, such as asbestosis and Legionnaires' disease, are found mainly indoors.

With NanoAce Philippines' products, we make sure that our nano-titanium dioxide purifies the air and leaves surfaces super-hydrophilic, self-cleaning, and hygienic 24 hours a day, 365 days a year, for many years after a single treatment.

Name: Nano Studio

Nano Studio is a venture platform pioneering the commercialization of advanced nanotechnologies across infrastructure, manufacturing, energy, environmental systems, and defense.

Our mission is to develop and deploy programmable materials that solve the structural, environmental, and operational failures built into today's systems. We believe infrastructure shouldn’t erode, materials shouldn’t decay, and industries shouldn’t collapse under climate, conflict, or time.

We operate as a venture studio—identifying critical problems, forming companies around proprietary IP, and accelerating scalable solutions through a unified nanotech foundation.

For Investors
Our studio strategy de-risks innovation by concentrating on platform technologies with multi-market potential. By launching and scaling ventures from a centralized core of R&D, IP, and manufacturing insight, we create compounding value across industries that are overdue for reinvention.

This isn’t about incremental change.
It’s about engineering the materials that will define the next century.

Name: TRUDots
Description:
Asset identification in the 21st Century has become increasingly difficult due to the generic nature of high value assets. Even if many security devices and systems exist, the problem with robbery, theft and fraud is still very serious. Often when items are recovered, there is generally an issue with confirming the assets original identity.

We have developed and introduced a product for identification and a system for protection of property under the trademark of TRUDOTS. This trademark is protected by the Czech patent authority. 

The system is based on marking assets with microdots. Marking is done in various hidden and visible locations on the asset. The information about the asset and its nanotechnology is stored on a TRUDOTS secure database. 

Our vision is to develop our brand within the EU specifically related to the automotive industry but not limited to it. Retaining consistency in quality by purchasing & producing locally and thereby offering a trusted EU brand. 

A microscope enables the reading of the unique codes on the microdot and confirm the true identity of the asset on the TRUDOTS database. 

Currently there are various microscope technologies that can be employed for reading the nanotechnology, from simple scopes attached to a mobile devices camera, including the basic microscope viewed through a lense to digital microscopes connected to fixed and mobile devices. The various microscopes are also available from TRUDOTS.

Name: PLAS Research Solutions
Description:
PLAS Research Solutions develops compact, automated platforms for laser-based nanoparticle synthesis for fast, clean, and on-site production of ultra-pure, sterile, and stable nanomaterials.
Our Pulsed Laser Ablation in Solution (PLAS) technology eliminates the need for chemical precursors, surfactants, toxic reagents, high pressure, deep vacuum, and industrial voltage. The result is reproducible, ligand-free nanoparticles produced in a single step. No post-processing required.
We serve research institutions, biotech labs, pharmaceutical companies, and deep-tech startups working at the forefront of nanomedicine, biotechnology, materials science, advanced diagnostics, drug delivery, and personalized medicine.
In addition, we offer contract manufacturing of chemically pure and sterile nanoparticles, tailored to your specifications. Whether you need gold, silver, iron, or custom alloy particles, we deliver high-quality suspensions for research, development, and early-stage production without impurities, and with full documentation.
PLAS empowers scientists and innovators to localize nanomaterial production, reduce costs, accelerate timelines, and meet rising standards for biomedical safety and quality.

Visit Us: plasresearch.solutions

Description:
About

Ignite Lab is a communal scholar company which is situated in the heart of Khayelitsha and was founded by Mzuvukile Monco, around November 2018.

The main aspire to this business is to create sustainable jobs and through technology uplift communities.

Company Overview

The organization is started with the aim of sourcing in technological ideas from townships to create a technology and science learning environment for young people to scientifical develop the world.

Changing communities through tech
Our first communal project 

In 2018, 4000 people were displaced when a fire ravaged through an informal settlement in Khayelitsha, Cape Town. Tragically this is a common occurrence throughout townships in South Africa, often leading to loss of life.

Lack of access to water and narrow paths between shacks delay rescue team access to affected areas allowing fires to spread fast from home to home.

Mzuvukile Monco is an entrepreneur who through his desire to use various low and high technology devices aims to prevent shack fires and other problems that affect his community.

Celem projektu jest rozwinięcie w Polsce Wschodniej działalności startupu Lumekko Sp. z o.o. w oparciu o innowacyjność produktową w ujęciu światowym. Efektem realizacji projektu będzie wprowadzenie na rynek unikatowych nanosystemów luminescencyjnych (świetlnych) służących do zabezpieczenia dokumentów, produktów, zabytków, dzieł sztuki przed fałszowaniem (podrabianiem).
Planowanymi efektami projektu jest pozyskanie rentownych rynków, w których efektywnie zostanie przyjęta innowacyjność i funkcjonalność zabezpieczeń, jak również metoda weryfikacji oryginalności oznakowanego produktu. Ponadto, w ramach projektu planuje się zwiększenie zespołu, stałe monitorowanie i wychodzenie naprzeciw oczekiwań użytkowników produktu, osiągnięcie rozpoznawalności rozwiązania i znaczącej pozycji na rynku.

Wartość projektu: 1 090 814, 63 zł przy wkładzie z Funduszy Europejskich wynoszącym 927 192,43 zł.

Name: TheBESTSeal
Description:
In modern society, we deserve a modern cleaning product. The BESTSeal is a proactive approach to sterilizing the touchpoints of your life. Together we can achieve a safe and happy life.

Once applied and sealed BESTSeal creates a self-sterilizing layer that requires only a quick rinse with water to wash away debris. Activated by ambient light, no matter how little, BESTSeal acts as a 24/7 watchdog. Germs and bacteria are then immediately eliminated from the surface, greatly reducing the opportunity to transmit disease. Think of the light as a battery and BESTSeal as a semiconductor. The more intense the light the faster it neutralizes germs and bacteria.

Name: AWNNTurkey2018
Description: On behalf of the AWNN organization & scientific committee,  we have great pleasure in welcoming you to the Advanced Workshop In Nanomedicine & Nanoscopy AWNN-2018, at the Erciyes University Campus, Turkey. The first nanotechnology Workshop in Kayseri aims to bring world-wide scientists in this multidisciplinary field to Turkey to disclose their important recent research. The Workshop also aims to show to the international participants,  the current nano-research and the state of the art nano-facilities available in Turkey and the region. This Workshop focuses on four main areas which are: Information Technology;  Material & Devices; Energy, and medicine.   Beside the invited elite speakers (6 Keynote and 15 Invited Speakers), we must received a total of 100 oral and poster abstracts from top academic individuals from many countries. Such presentations are tackling subjects like: nanostructure growth, fabrication, model, device design, testing, applications. Beside this main academic role of the  Advanced Workshop In Nanomedicine & Nanoscopy AWNN-2018, there is another important role we decided to consider at this Workshop, which is enhancing the society awareness about nanotechnology. Name: ANGSTROM_MERA
Description:
ANGSTROM: Plasma-Engineered Materials for Next-Generation Supercapacitors
ANGSTROM is a European research project tackling one of today’s biggest energy challenges: how to store power efficiently and sustainably. While batteries dominate the market, they face critical issues-scarcity of raw materials, safety risks, and limited lifespans. Supercapacitors offer fast charging and long durability, but their energy density needs a major boost.
Our solution? An eco-friendly plasma-enabled approach to design multifunctional hybrid electrodes. We combine Vertical Nanocarbon (VN) with Porous Active Materials (PAM) such as Covalent Organic Frameworks (COF) and highly conformal Porous Metal Oxides (PMO). This synergy will deliver high energy and power density, superior cycling stability, and pave the way for flexible, scalable devices.
The project moves from lab-scale concepts (TRL3) to industrial prototypes (TRL6), validating performance under real conditions and exploring commercialization. Applications range from electric vehicles and smart grids to IoT and wearable electronics.
Our consortium brings together leading expertise:
•	CSIC (Spain) – Plasma synthesis and advanced metal oxides.
•	Jožef Stefan Institute (Slovenia) – Nanocarbon growth and surface engineering.
•	CEITEC (Czech Republic) – 3D printing and flexible electrode design.
•	IQS nano (Czech Republic) – Industrial partner driving scale-up and prototyping.
ANGSTROM aligns with the EU Green Deal and Horizon Europe priorities, contributing to decarbonization and circular economy goals through sustainable, zero-waste processes.

Name: FUTURAMA, s.r.o.
Description:
FUTURAMA s.r.o. je spoločnosť, zaoberajúca sa obchodnou činnosťou s produktami na báze nových vedeckých objavov a technológií. Zameriava sa na distribúciu a predaj tekutých ochranných prípravkov na báze chemickej nanotechnológie, zložených z nosnej látky a komponentov veľkosti nanometrov.

Zaoberáme sa predovšetkým výrobkami na ochranu rôznych druhov minerálnych povrchov a materiálov. Nanotechnológia predlžuje životnosť výrobkov a materiálov a uľahčuje ich údržbu. Ochrana životného prostredia je jedným z najdôležitejších prínosov, ktoré nanotechnológia prináša.

Povrchy ošetrené pomocou nanotechnológie získavajú tzv. lotosový efekt. To v praxi znamená, že na vyčistenie povrchu stačí len čistá voda bez akýchkoľvek chemických prostriedkov. Povrch je naviac odpudivý voči vode, olejom a mastnotám, takže zabraňuje pevnému usadzovaniu nečistôt. Z tohto princípu chovania sú odvodené a ďalej prepracované vlastnosti našich produktov. Sú zamerané na zušľachtenie, impregnáciu a ochranu rôznych druhov materiálov – kameňa, betónu, keramiky, dreva, papiera, skla a textilu.

Naše výrobky sú šetrné k životnému prostrediu, ľahko použiteľné a dosahujú dlhodobú účinnosť. Na konštrukciu produktov výrobca používa najnovšie poznatky a objavy výskumu, ako aj doterajšie skúsenosti z oblasti chemickej nanotechnológie.

Scalability and Market Impact

•	Supporting Clean Energy: Supplying critical graphene solutions for energy storage and EV batteries to bolster India’s electric mobility revolution.

Driving Economic Growth and Sustainability
Aligned with India’s goals for technological self-reliance and clean energy, Zentek Nanotech India focuses on eco-friendly innovations that reduce environmental impact while improving efficiency and performance.

In collaboration with MSU and Fraunhofer USA, Scion Plasma LLC has developed innovative single beam ion sources for producing high-quality thin films. The new ion sources possess a few unique features that overcome the limitations of conventional ion sources.

Our plasma modeling software is based on efficient algorithms and is >30 times faster than the current particle-in-cell/Monte Carlo schemes. Modeling a low-pressure magnetized plasma in a practical scale can be completed in less than 24 hours on a desktop computer.

Name: MODYTICS
Description: MODYTICS aims at the discovery of performing new adsorbents and catalysts for respiratory filters and protective clothes in general against toxic chemicals. The first task focuses on the validation of miniaturised adsorption column which shall enable a rapid screening of new nanomaterials (MOFs, advanced carbons and zeolites) in relevant conditions. The second task aims at the simulation of adsorption breakthrough curves by integration of modelling approaches on different scale of length (nm to cm). The engineering of the intra-granular porosity at grain scale will be particularly investigated. The ambition of the project is to set the fundamental background for enabling and accelerating the discovery of performing innovative material filters (physisorption, chemisorption, catalysis) which fulfil practical constraints.

Name: Genano China
Description:
Genano歌兰诺是一款可以祛除纳米级悬浮微粒的医疗级空气净化器。1999年创立于芬兰 ，产品为超过20个国家提供产品和服务，在超过40个国家（包括中国）拥有专利。
   歌兰诺技术是以自然空气流来净化空气，空气量和净化级别是恒定不变的。歌兰诺空气净化器不会像 HEPA滤网净化器那样被大量颗粒物堵塞，也无需更换价格不菲的滤网。
   同时在医疗洁净室方案中，Genano歌兰诺的净化级别可达到ISO6（千级）/7（万级）级。各种专业领域的实际应用案例（如沙特阿拉伯针对MERS使用Genano歌兰诺等）以及世界权威机构的检测报告让Genano歌兰诺在空气净化行业中有着非同寻常的竞争优势。
   Genano歌兰诺技术优势：
   ● 去除空气中各种尺寸的颗粒物，其效果达到纳米级。（1纳米=1毫米的百万分之一）
   ● 杀灭微生物，如细菌、病毒等（包括SASR、MRSA、DNA分子，以及MERS等超级病菌）。
   ● 吸附有毒气体和异味（TVOC)。
   ● 经济实用（无需更换滤网，耐用，维护成本低，不会形成二次污染）

Name: 深圳华烯新材料有限公司
Description:
深圳华烯新材料有限公司于2015年8月在深圳光明区留创园成立，注册资本5000万元人民币，国家高新技术企业、深圳市高新技术企业，专注于石墨烯的研发、检测、生产及技术咨询等领域，研发中心设有多个材料实验室，可开展多项新材料研究、实验和检测工作及服务。
深圳华烯已通过ISO9001体系认证、知识产权管理体系认证、CNAS(中国合格评定国家认可委员会)实验室认可，是国内最先在石墨烯领域获得此认可的机构，具有严格规范化的、世界领先水平的、专业化的石墨烯研发及材料检测能力。
华烯拥有多项核心技术，现有多项石墨烯相关领域专利获得授权；华烯主导制定的4项石墨烯检测标准已在IEC获得立项，其中一项已经进入“RPUB阶段”，一项进入“DTS阶段”，在材料检测领域华烯成为全球首个主导制定石墨烯检测标准最多的中国企业。华烯参与制定的《石墨烯材料术语和代号》和《含有石墨烯材料的产品命名指南》两项产业团体标准已由中国石墨烯产业技术创新战略联盟标准委员会在2018年6月向全球发布。为下游产品制定的多项企业标准已自我声明并开始执行。
深圳华烯参与建设的石墨烯粉体生产基地已在江西九江成功投产，具有年产吨级的高品质石墨烯粉体生产能力，为下游行业应有提供优质原材料保障。深圳华烯是中国石墨烯产业技术创新战略联盟（CGIA）成员单位、中国石墨烯联盟标准委员会成员单位、中关村华清石墨烯产业技术创新联盟单位、中关村材料实验技术联盟单位、广东省纳米标准委员会成员单位、广东省石墨烯制造创新中心理事单位、深圳市石墨烯协会理事单位等，并曾荣获深圳市创业创业资助、第18届高新技术成果交易会优秀产品奖等荣誉。
深圳华烯独立及合作联合开发了多种应用产品，如居于行业领先水平的高品质石墨烯粉体材料、用于化学分析检测前处理的石墨烯固相萃取柱(SPE)、石墨烯空气净化系列产品、美容护肤产品、免喷涂透显材料、石墨烯熔喷材料等产品，部分产品已推向市场，获得客户高度认同，在研产品已完成小试和中试，正在进行工业化生产筹备工作中。除了自主研发外，公司还可根据客户需要，进行定制化研发、生产特殊性能参数的石墨烯材料及应用产品。
深圳华烯与中国科学院、清华大学、深圳市标准技术研究院、哈尔滨工业大学、深圳粤网节能技术服务有限公司、九江烯诺菲科技有限公司、深圳市绚图新材料科技公司、深圳阿尔法生物科技有限公司、华控赛格、广州创特技术有限公司等科研院校、企事业单位、投资机构、及多个行业协会等各界展开广泛的交流与合作。公司理念：创新、发展、分享、卓越、合作、共赢。管理团队经验丰富，研发团队精炼、充满活力，具有与世界水平同步的专业素质。深圳华烯愿与海内外客户及合作伙伴竭诚合作、共创未来！

Name: Nanotec Coatings SA
Description:
Nanotec Coatings - The future of hydrophobic corrosion protection.

Developed by KL Smith, Founder of Nanotec Coatings (Pty) Ltd.

Largely due to economic conditions it becomes vital for property owners to find a long lasting solution to protect there assets with. Our Nano Seal SP range of products are very well placed to do just that. We don't sell a guarantee to our clients, we offer a 25 year life expectancy.

The 6000 hours crosshatch test on mild steel went into a QUV chamber and all 3 plates have performed above expectations. The plates were tested according to the SABS 1022:2009 and SABS ISO 4628 for the evaluation of degradation of paint coatings on metal plates. The plates were coated with our Etch 3 Metal Primer (water-based) at 20 um and an intermediate coat of Nano Seal SP 25 also at 20 um dry film thickness followed by an wet-adhesion promoted terpolymer topcoat Steel Coat 60 (2 in 1). The topcoat was applied by sponge roller to create fish-eyes and hoping to achieve 1000 hours as an acceptable industry standard. 

Then in November 2015 we got a breakthrough as Petra Diamond Finch Mine accepted our product and was then used on there E-Thickener tank and we completed the shutdown in 96hrs. Now 18 months later we got our report from the Plant Engineer showing amazing results with no rust-creep and the hydrophobic Nano Seal SP 25 still intact. 

Nano Seal SP is ideally suited for all concrete surfaces. No fungus growth and almost super-hydrophobic in nature.  Nano-screeds will be the end of torch-on bituminous products. We believe once tests have been completed that it will also be the end of potholes once implemented as a road stabilizer for tar surfaces.

For a free demo visit: https://www.facebook.com/Nanoteccoatings8/ and watch our Petra Diamond video on YouTube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=znh4Xufg870

Thank you for taking the time to read this. For more details call Kenny on 084 813 3989 or on 074 309 2306

Name: nanoScaffold Technologies, LLC
Description:
nanoScaffold Technologies is a consulting firm dedicated to accelerating the development, implementation, and commercialization of nanofiber technology and products for academic and industrial clients.

Tremendous advances in the design and the fabrication of nanoscaffolds, and in nanofiber technology in particular, have been made in the past decade. Nevertheless, exploiting this technology in a commercially viable way has proven to be less than trivial. To overcome this challenge our clients capitalize on the company's strong technological and market expertise, as well as a variety of services and products that are designed to help capture and leverage  the competitive advantages of nanofiber technology.

A nanoscaffold is a three-dimensional structure with nanometer (10-9 m) scale features that imparts unique physical and performance characteristics at the macroscopic level. Nanoscaffolds can be fabricated using electrospun polymeric nanofibers, which is arguably the most versatile and fastest growing methodology.

Name: Nanostructure Physics Group
Description: The Nanostructure Physics Group of the Faculty of Science, University of Ostrava is interested in electronic structure theory, computational modeling of atomic-scale molecular complexes and nanomaterials. Besides the application of traditional methods (quantum chemistry, density functional theory), an important research direction is development and applications of alternative methods like, e.g., stochastic electronic structure methods (quantum Monte Carlo) and their use for accurate description of electronic structure or quantum motion of nuclei. The applications include molecules, clusters, solids, surfaces and nanomaterials, prediction of structural, electronic, optical and adsorption properties and interaction strength. To date, many demanding systems were studied successfully, including transition metals, their oxides, non-covalent interactions and physisorption, nuclear delocalisation effects of strongly quantum systems and excitonic effects in nanostructures.

Name: "Institute of Physiological Active Compounds" LLC

The structural organisation of the Institute includes scientific research subdivisions, a centre for implementing research results, facilities for manufacturing products on the basis of hydrated fullerene, and for offering commercial services. The Institute enjoys close scientific relations with numerous domestic and foreign scientific centres.
The Institute holds a leading position with respect to the study of hydrated fullerene C60 – an amazing symbiosis of pure carbon nanomolecules and water molecules. Hydrated fullerene has proven to be a unique instrument for scientific cognition, which is helping to bring scientists closer to understanding the role of water in living matter. Through the study of its multi-faceted activity, one becomes convinced of the fact that, during the origination and functioning of living matter, special water structures play a predominant role.

Name: Produse Nano
Description:
Seri Nano Grup este o companie care promoveaza un stil de viata sanatos, oferind produse bio si nano atat pentru tine cat si pentru casa, birou, masina, etc.  Toate produsele sunt ecologice si au la baza solutia micelara, bine cunoscuta in Romania in produsele pentru demachiere.

Ce inseamna produse nano?
Produsele nano sunt realizate cu  nanotehnologie care reprezinta inginerie la scara mica, constand in constructia sistematica la dimensiuni atomice si moleculare.  Tot ce ne incojoara este format din atomi inclusiv corpul nostru.
Nanotehnologia se foloseste in numeroase domenii, cum ar fi tehnologia informatiei si comunicatiile, energie, sanatate si medicina. La baza acestei tehnologii stau nanoparticule care actioneaza  sub forma de nanosigililari. Acestea au rolul de a atribui suprafetelor o rezistenta deosebita la zgariere si uzura cu o indelungata protectie anticoroziva.

Scopul produselor nano este de curatare usoara si protejare pe termen lung, intr-un mod natural.
Am valorificat cu adevarat puterea nanotehnologiei intr-o gama de produse sigure, fiabile, de incredere, care sunt special realizate pentru fiecare tip de suprafata. Am ales din produse similar pe piata sa lucram cu producatori de prestigiu, pentru premiile international obtinute, pentru performanta produselor, pentru pretul accesibil si de asemenea datorita caracterului ecologic al produselor din gama lor.
Oferim si o gama variata de produse ecologice si antialergice obtinute din compusi naturali care contin si elemente nano. Produsele noastre realizeaza o curatare la nivel molecular.
Pentru ca promovam un stil de viata sanatos si echilibrat, venim in intampinarea ta cu produse naturale care sa imbunatateasca si in acelasi timp sa usureze viata atat pentru tine cat si pentru tot ce te inconjoara.

La nanotecnologia presente en los productos XADO, repara, restaura y protege todas aquellas superficies metálicas que como resultado de su normal proceso de operación, se ven sometidas a desgaste por fricción. La piezas recuperan su volumen desgastado y, como resultado (según el área de aplicación): se iguala y aumenta considerablemente la compresión de los cilindros, se reduce el consumo de combustible, se mejora la respuesta del motor, se restauran las bombas de aceite, las unidades de turboalimentación, los cigüeñales y casquillos. Name: Park Systems North America and LATAM
Description:
Park Systems, the world-leading innovator in Atomic Force Microscopy (AFM), enables researchers and engineers around the globe to contribute to impactful science and technological development that helps humanity to grow and improve life standards.

With Park’s high-performance scientific instruments for academic and industrial communities, we help to explore new phenomena in chemistry, materials, physics, life sciences, semiconductor, and data storage industries. Cutting-edge AFM automation and the highest data accuracy enables to become more efficient, more accurate and more productive at your work.

With the in-built robotics and AI features of the newly introduced FX40 Automatic AFM, Park Systems has opened the door to quantitative high-resolution imaging for interdisciplinary researchers and industry engineers.

Visit http://www.parksystems.com for more information

Park Systems, el innovador líder mundial en microscopía de fuerza atómica (AFM), permite a los investigadores e ingenieros de todo el mundo contribuir al desarrollo científico y tecnológico impactante que ayuda a la humanidad a crecer y mejorar los estándares de vida. 

Con los instrumentos científicos de alto rendimiento de Park para comunidades académicas e industriales, ayudamos a explorar nuevos fenómenos en las industrias de química, materiales, física, ciencias de la vida, semiconductores y almacenamiento de datos. La automatización AFM de vanguardia y la más alta precisión de datos le permiten ser más eficiente, más preciso y más productivo en su trabajo. 

Con la robótica incorporada y las características de IA del recién introducido FX40 Automatic AFM, Park Systems ha abierto la puerta a imágenes cuantitativas de alta resolución para investigadores interdisciplinarios e ingenieros de la industria. 

Visite http://www.parksystems.com para obtener más información.

Name: Partikel, LLC
Description:
Partikel's exclusive products harness nano technology to solve big problems. Our products are fully commercialized, with an excellent record of success in Europe, Canada and the Middle East. Now, we are bringing them to the United States market.  

Our portfolio includes the following product lines:

Multi-functional Surface Coatings: Dozens of formulations designed to protect assets, equipment and facilities from the harmful effects of corrosion and contamination. Available in industrial and consumer-friendly formulations.

Dry Film Lubricant/Anti-Corrosion Coatings: Proprietary blend of nano particles form permanent (covalent) bonds with metal surfaces to protect and lubricate guns and other industrial surfaces where metal-to-metal friction and corrosion cause problems. 

Rust Preventative: Water-based coating prevents corrosion of exposed metal surfaces during storage and transportation. 

Fire-Retardant/Fire-Resistant Coatings: Water-based formulations that are designed to resist fire in architectural wood and textiles. Additional products can be applied to homes, businesses and vegetation to prevent the spread of wildfires in populated areas.

Industrial Degreasers: Non-toxic formulas that significantly out-perform traditional products, without harming the environment.

Water Remediation/Water Treatments: Multiple formulas that separate oil and other organic matter from water, neutralize dangerous H2S, kill harmful microbes and rapidly break down hydrocarbons in environmental remediation projects.

We are actively seeking sub-distributors, white label resellers and product applicators throughout the US. We also work directly with OEM partners to incorporate our products during the manufacturing process, and our in-house R&D team can create custom formulations to meet specific project requirements.

Name: NanoYo Harmony
Description:
Harmony olarak misyonumuz, koronavirüs salgını (COVID-19) ile mücadele ettiğimiz bu zor dönemde ve sonrasında, size yeşil teknolojik çözümler ile daha iyi bir hayat sunmak. Nano titanyum dioksit bazlı fotokatalitik yüzey kaplama ürünümüz - kalıcı dezenfektan, tek seferlik uygulama ile havayı ve yüzeyleri kendi kendine temizlenen hijyenik alanlar haline getirir.

Harmony, 1987’den beri Ankara ve İstanbul’da birçok proje ve işbirliğine imza atmış, özellikle bilgisayar sektöründe onlarca referansı bulunan bilinir ve güvenilir bir firmadır. 

Haziran 2020’den beri Japonya’da yıllardır nanoteknoloji üzerine çalışan NanoYo Group ile NanoYo titanyum dioksit bazlı kalıcı fotokatalitik yüzey kaplama ürünü - kalıcı dezenfektan tedariği ve uygulanması hizmeti vermektedir. NanoYo Group’un şu anda Türkiye’deki tek resmi temsilcisi/distribütörü ve ortağıdır. Harmony olarak misyonumuz hepimizin daha iyi, daha sağlıklı bir yaşam sürmesine yardımcı olmaktır. Nano titanyum dioksit kaplamalarımız, ülkemizde yaşayan herkes için, sadece tek seferlik bir uygulama ile, 365 gün temiz hava, hijyenik yüzeyler ve hastalıklara karşı korunma sağlar.

Japonya'daki ortaklarımız, bugün piyasadaki en küçük TiO2 partiküllerini geliştirerek herhangi bir ışık kaynağı ile yüzeylerin kendi kendini temizlemesine imkan tanıdı. NanoYo, insanlara daha temiz ortamlar ve daha taze, daha temiz hava sağlamak için dünyanın dört bir yanındaki ülkelerde, sayısız endüstride ve pazarda kullanılmaktadır.

Harmony, evde, işte veya ulaşımda çevre dostu teknolojisi ile daha kolay nefes almanıza ve daha sağlıklı hayatlar yaşamanıza yardımcı olur.

İletişim: iletisim@nanoyo-harmony.com

Name: Heebut Materials LLC
Description: Heebut Materials, headquartered in Seattle, specializes in carbon nanotube (CNT) products designed specifically for electrostatic dissipative (ESD) applications. Their cutting-edge technology provides cost-effective and robust solutions, surpassing traditional methods. Heebut’s ESD additives allow the creation of coatings with ultra-low carbon nanotube loading (just a few parts per ten thousand), resulting in permanent ESD properties. These coatings are available in optical transparency and a variety of aesthetic colors. Heebut’s additives have been successfully applied in epoxy, polyurethane, and various aqueous and latex coating systems. Additionally, Heebut offers optically transparent ESD films with a variety of substrates.

Name: nanociti
Description:
Ofrecemos a nuestros clientes soluciones innovadoras y eficientes en el cuidado y protección de cualquier tipo de superficie, utilizando productos de limpieza y sanitización, así como recubrimientos y selladores nanotecnológicos de alta calidad, que agregan características de hidrofóbia y oleofóbia a las superficies tratadas. 

Nuestras alternativas de solución son vanguardistas. Nuestros productos son importados de Alemania, Suiza, España y Australia, y tienen el objetivo primordial de reducir los costos de mantenimiento y limpieza de las superficies, fomentando el cuidado y la protección del medio ambiente.

Nuestros productos diseñados para la industria de la construcción, a nivel industrial, comercial y residencial, son utilizados para sellar superficies de cualquier tipo de piedra, cemento, concreto, ladrillo, vidrio, cualquier tipo de metal y acero inoxidable, cerámicos, pieles y tela, protegiéndolos de los efectos adversos provocados por el medio ambiente, y dando como resultado que las superficies tratadas se conserven limpias por más tiempo, libres de manchas provocadas por hongo, bacterias y salitre. Además ofrecemos productos que vuelven anti-derrapante superficies resbalosas, incrementando la seguridad de las personas que transitan por ellas.

El automóvil es un bien de alto valor para cualquier persona. La industria automotriz se ha visto bastante beneficiada con nuestros productos. Comercializamos recubrimientos para la pintura y laca automotriz, vidrios, plásticos y policarbonatos, metales y cromos, piel y fibras textiles, que protegen la superficie tratada, y evitan cualquier tipo de mancha proveniente de líquidos y aceites.

Los productos de limpieza especializada y sanitizantes son utilizados para eliminar agentes contaminantes que afectan nuestra salud, como hongos, bacterias, algas y ácaros de polvo. Con ellos ayudamos a combatir alergias provocadas por estos gémenes.

Fanavaran Sanat Novin Garsha is a knowledge-based company specializing in advanced nanomaterials and innovative material technologies. Our capabilities include the design and synthesis of metallic, polymeric, and hybrid nanomaterials, along with advanced porous frameworks such as MOFs and COFs. Name: NNT 2019
Description:
NNT 2019, the 18th International Conference on Nanoimprint and Nanoprint Technologies, the world’s leading symposium on nanoimprint and nanoprint, will take place October 14-16, 2019, at The Boston Seaport Hotel, Boston Massachusetts, USA.

NNT2019 is focused on Next Generation Technologies, Products and Manufacturing Processes and is structured with both the research and commercial communities in mind. The meeting will feature invited and contributed lectures on the latest developments in imprint technology. A series of plenary lectures from leading researchers within and external to the imprint community will focus on new and emerging areas in which imprint technology can expand and have significant commercial and scientific impact, including metamaterials, augmented and virtual reality, energy generation and storage, intelligent nanoscale devices and the life sciences. The conference will also offer a unique nanoimprint ecosystem session and roundtable discussion in which providers of tools, masters, materials and open access research and process development facilities will converge in a single session to provide a comprehensive look at potential commercialization paths for bringing product concepts from the laboratory to manufacturing. NNT 2019 will feature an extensive poster session describing recent science and technology advances as well as vendor exhibits from companies and institutes spanning the NIL ecosystem. An online portal for pre scheduling 1:1 meetings among conference participants, presenters in the ecosystem sessions and/or vendors will be provided to maximize opportunities for relationship building. Additional opportunities for networking and informal socializing will occur on a dinner cruise on the Boston Harbor.

Name: Net4Air
Description:
Net4Air project, run by the National R&D Institute for Microtechnologies in Bucharest, Romania, is a Coordination and Support Action funded by the European Commission under the Twinning framework.
The goals of the Net4Air project are to significantly advance excellence capacity and resources in IMT with a view of addressing the research and innovation gap and imbalance within Europe by broadly increasing IMT expertise, know-how and attractiveness in innovative nanotechnologies, materials, devices, smart systems, data analytics and best-practices for environment monitoring. Project’s goals are in line with the European Green Deal principles for protecting the environment and contributing to citizens health and wellbeing. 
A Networking Centre for excellence in Nanoelectronics was launched within the project by joining together around the Consortium partners and the R&D actors (from research institutes, universities departments, environmental  NGOs, national accredited labs, SMEs, and big industrial players) in Sensing Technologies and Data management for Environmental monitoring applications, to bridge the gap between Western Europe organizations and lower-performing institutions in Romania and therefore making a contribution towards facilitating Romania’s better integration into the European Research Area.

Name: Notty Buzz
Description:
Notty Smart Notification Ring vibrates and lights up whenever you receive a notification on your phone !

What is Notty?
- Notty is the first FULLY FUNCTIONAL wearable device of its kind!
- Notty is a useful and stylish accessory which will help you keep in touch with your phone activity. You can see when you receive a call, text message or e-mail.
- It’s helpful in improving your time management, as you’ll never miss an important moment and you’ll receive all your notifications on time without pulling your phone out of your pocket or purse!

How Notty Works?
- Notty uses Bluetooth low energy protocol (BLE) to connect to your phone and instantly starts receiving notifications.
- It comes equipped with a vibration motor and a series of LEDs which help you to distinguish between your notification types. For example, you can use a red light for calls and messaging, a green light for e-mails and a yellow light for games and calendar. The vibration and light interval can be set up using the control app on your phone.
 Battery life is one of the most important aspects of a wearable device. Notty’s algorithm allows you to use it for as long as 14 days before recharging. It uses one of the smallest size rechargeable lithium-ion battery on the market.
- Notty’s improved communication range allows you to stay connected with your phone for up to 50m without any delay or interruption. It uses a set of custom aluminum antennas specialy designed for long range.
- One of the most important aspects of Notty is its build quality. It is light weight and durable due to very strong polymer plastics, able to resist the hardest shocks and waterproof for up to 100m.
- Notty comes with it’s own app witch will help you set up your notification styles and custom functions for your ring. You can also update your ring with the newest firmware update once it is available via this app.

Name: EMet Nanotech LLC
Description:
Our mission is to make cryo-electron microscopy a reliable and cost effective way to visualize 3D structures in drug design. 

What is Cryo-Electron Microscopy (Cryo-EM)? 

~Biopharma companies use 3D structures of targeted proteins to understand many diseases and develop effective drug therapies
~Cryo-electron microscopy (cryo-EM) has revolutionized the speed and power of protein structure determination, and understanding how proteins interact with drugs
~Critically, in many instances where traditional methods (NMR and X-ray crystallography) fail to create 3D images of complex proteins, cryo-EM has filled this gap 

Problem:  The sample preparation process is dependent on creating a viable sample that the microscope can read which currently depends on trial and error.  

Our Solution: 
We have created a technology that requires only our nanofabricated chip to create a thin and consistent sample that can be inserted directly into the current microscopes.  

Our Technology: 

~Materials create capillary forces with hydrophilicity to keep the sample stable and integrated into the chip before frozen 
~Design prevents denaturation of protein at the surface of ice layer with no need for large volume or the blotting process 
~The chip is created to easily replace current grids but with all the sample prep benefits. Our chip provides faster image processing due to configuration of molecules

Name: EChem Nanowires Educational Foundation, Inc.
Description:
This educational foundation was established to create opportunities for high school and college students by engaging them in nanotechnology research and stimulating them into wanting to make discoveries of their own. The foundation was closed in 2015 as part of my leaving Wisconsin, but I am feeling the urge to help develop new educational opportunities.  The foundation builds upon the Electroplate and Lift Lithography technology with the development of a kit that contains everything needed with the exception of water and the chemicals. As part of a class exercise, students can be one of the first few hundred students in the world to make copper microwires. The kit and supporting documentation guide students through necessary steps to grow and characterize microwires and even nanowires on our unique ultrananocrystalline diamond templates with the supplied tools including a full 3-electrode, web-enabled electrochemical potentiostat, a USB powered 700X microscope and a color Android tablet. 
The goal is to enable students with skills and the right tools to be the first person in the world to use the Electroplate and Lift Lithography technique for making new compositions of patterned nanowires. The experiments are set up to give confidence with the skills needed to make their own discoveries. After submission of promising preliminary data, the student would be invited to our laboratory or the laboratory of a collaborator to use more advanced techniques such as scanning electron microscopy and energy dispersive spectroscopy to confirm they are truly the first in the world to make that type of nanowire. Future plans are to support high achieving student’s efforts to gain entrance to the colleges of their choice and to assist students in finding scholarships that will help their dreams for making future discoveries to come true.

Email for more information and whitepaper.

Name: Pioneer Technology Solutions
Description:
Pioneer Technology Solutions, Inc.
Who We Are
An active player in the field of nanotechnology, Pioneer Technology Solutions is a premier supplier of hydrophobic coatings for the electric power industry.

The Problem We Solve
Porcelain and glass insulators in contaminated areas experience performance issues due to flashovers and other problems. Existing strategies to combat this problem include the application of silicone greases or RTV coatings to the insulators. Both methods tend to lose effectiveness when the insulator becomes highly contaminated, which requires that the insulators be cleaned and the coating re-applied. To date, the industry continues to search for an effective solution to the contamination problem.

What We Do
We help customers worldwide improve the performance of glass and porcelain insulators by protecting them from dirt, fog.

Name: NUCRET
Description:
The Center of Renewable Energy and Technology (NUCRET) is a premier example of Northeastern University's commitment to sustainability. This initiative places a strong focus on education, outreach, and entrepreneurship in the realm of sustainability. We strive to lead the way in the science and technology of clean energy by delving into materials science, advanced in situ spectroscopy, micro-fabrication methods, and manufacturing technology. The interdisciplinary team comprises chemists, physicists, engineers, and economist/policy analysts, all united in the common goal of improving the conversion and storage of clean energy. Collaborating with partners worldwide, NUCRET and its team are dedicated to fostering a sustainable future.

Under the guidance of Dr. Sanjeev Mukerjee, a Distinguished Professor of Chemistry and Chemical Biology, we spearhead national and global efforts in developing the future of fuel cells. Recognizing the limitations of current technology, which relies on precious metal catalysts like platinum, NUCRET focuses on creating platinum-free catalysts and novel chemistries for advanced rechargeable batteries. The applications span from portable power to large-scale energy storage (lithium-ion, lithium-air, lithium-oxygen, sodium-air, hydrogen-bromine), addressing a significant barrier in the field.

Situated conveniently on Northeastern University's campus in the buzzing city of Boston, known as the "College Capital" of America, we benefit from its location as a hub for scientific research. This unique position allows NUCRET to capitalize on cutting-edge research in renewable energy storage, conservation, and harvesting, fostering collaboration with leading institutions and companies in Massachusetts and around the world.

Description:

Tourmaline's health benefits have been known and applied by ancient civilizations to aid in numerous health recovery situations and to promote wellness. With its innate far infrared ray (FAR) properties, it is popularly used in modern Reiki and Far Infrared Saunas. Of all the existing hard minerals on Earth only tourmaline holds permanent electrical potential, also known as piezo-electricity. Only in recent years have clinical studies begun to give tourmaline the attention it truly deserves. 

With our technology, which just happens to also be eco-friendly and have a very low carbon footprint, we create game-changing products and solutions which apply  tourmaline infused nano-crystals for industrial, consumer and household uses. We realize that we have just opened doors to a vast number of tremendous industry applications. Initially 6 industries stand to benefit from our breakthroughs, with several more to follow.

We invite you to join us on our journey.

Description:
Product: T1 is an innovative fuel additive for gasoline, diesel and ethanol based internal combustion (IC) engines. It consists of T1 Formula, a unique water based low concentration metal nanoparticle fuel additive, and T1 Injector, a specifically designed injector for applying the formula into the engine.

Value proposition: In a world demanding better solutions to global energy and climate changing problems, T1 improves engine efficiency by 10% for gasoline and 8% for diesel on average while simultaneously reducing CO, NOx and Soot emissions. It does this in a very affordable and low impactful manner.

Customers / users: Customers and users of T1 are both IC engine manufacturers and end users.

Business model & commercialisation: T1 will be sold to in-use engines via installers and distributors, while it will be provided to engine manufacturers via a technology licence. The solution will first be adopted by in-use engines due to lower barriers of entry. Once demonstrated and validated in this environment we then expect to get our first licence sales.

Key partnerships secured: Cambustion (UK) & Chalmers University (SE) for vehicle verifications; Coventry University (UK) & Brighton University (UK) for engine analysis; WetSus (NL) & NHL Stenden (NL) for liquid properties analysis; and Brockley (IE) & DIT/CREST (IE) for technical and manufacturing developments; Westward Engineering (IE) &  Lawlors' Automotive Solutions (IE) for vehicle tuning; Recon Waste Managements (UK) for lorry testing; and Hanna-Moore-Curely (IE) for legal advises.

Name: Minus 100
Description: Minus 100 is a family owned and operated business. It was founded in 2003, and is located in North East Pennsylvania. The President, Mr. Kevin C. CoreMorrow provides domestic and foreign customers with precision positioning technology solutions and products, which can achieve sub-nanometer resolution and nanometer positioning accuracy. The products mainly include plate/ring actuator, piezo ceramic/stack, piezo actuator with casing, piezo motor, 1 to 6-dimensional piezo nanopositioning /scanning /translation stage, 1 to 3-dimensional piezo deflection /rotation / steering platform, piezo objective positioner, 6 hexapod parallel mechanism, piezo driver/controller, inductance/capacitance/laser micrometer. Also, we provide maintenance services for piezoelectric products such as piezoelectric dispensing valves. Our products have been widely used in semiconductor technology, optoelectronics, communication and integrated optics, optical instruments and equipment, medical biological microscopy equipment, life sciences, precision processing equipment, medical design and technology, data storage, nanotechnology, nanomanufacturing and nano-automation, aerospace, image processing and other fields.

Name: Centre of Excellence in MEMS & Microfluidics (CEMM)
Description:
The Centre of Excellence in MEMS and Microfluidics (CEMM) at Rajalakshmi Engineering College, Chennai, is a premier interdisciplinary research and development facility focused on Micro-Electro-Mechanical Systems (MEMS) and microfluidic technologies. Established under the National MEMS Development Center (NMDC) program of NPMASS, the center aims to drive innovation in biomedical diagnostics, sensors, and lab-on-chip solutions through high-precision microfabrication.

CEMM is equipped with state-of-the-art infrastructure including Class-1000 and Class-10000 cleanroom facilities, photolithography tools, thin-film deposition systems, and advanced microscopes. It serves as a hub for collaborative research involving students, faculty, and industry partners, with a strong focus on affordable and scalable device development for real-world applications.

With support from national agencies like DST-TSDP, the center is currently executing projects worth over ₹1.2 crore in low-cost healthcare diagnostics. Through its active engagement in chip design, fabrication, and system-level integration, CEMM is shaping the future of micro-scale technology in India.

Name: FES (Fire Extinction Systems)
Description:
FES Technology allows any place or electrical installation to be fire-proof; in the way that everywhere FES is installed, we guarantee that the fire will be extinguished immediately, directly at the origin of the fire and will prevent any spreading of the fire.

The technology behind is the use of nanotechnology to microencapsulate extinguishing agents within microcapsules that are sensitive to heat. As soon as heat is nearby of the microcapsules, they will release the agent and instantaneously extinguish the fire.

It comes in two forms: the PyroSticker and the PyroCord.
The Sticker protects small areas (from electrical sockets to electrical boxes) and is very easy to install, it just has to be stick on the upper surface to protect.
As soon as it is installed, it does not require any human intervention nor maintenance: as soon as there will be a fire nearby, it will trigger the Sticker.
Similarly, the Cord protects a larger area like electrical panel, cables etc...

Name: Impervious
Description:
Current research is constantly revealing the benefits of nanotechnology in the world of science and technology. Inspired by the many uses of nano-tech and its emergence into many fields of commerce, the Impervious team set out to create the first multi-purpose waterproofing spray product designed for consumer electronics.  Located in Los Angeles, the company developed their current product with expert guidance from local industry leaders and scientists with backgrounds in chemistry and quantum nano science.

After many exhaustive rounds of product and application testing, Impervious officially launched online with a successful crowdfunding campaign that received a flood of international media attention and rave product reviews from ABC news and UK based Yachting World Magazine saying “Impervious products have proved to be very effective - I have poured water over my phones multiple times and they continue to function.” Furthermore, the demand for this type of product has run much deeper than the cell phone market. Just 1 year later, Impervious is preparing to come to the global consumer electronics marketplace with applications for phones, gadgets, drones, audio, video & lighting equipment to name a few. 

The introduction of Impervious comes at a time when the majority of people across the world haven’t fully realized the wide range of everyday uses for a versatile nano-technology product. Impervious has inspired a whole new paradigm in which the everyday person can create new interactions with their electronics and liquids all within the palm of their hands. The empowering benefit of this product is that the customer has access to a product with unlimited application possibilities.

With over 40 years combined process-engineering experience in the grinding & dispersing equipment industry, Dynamic Dispersions LLC has the know-how to help our clients bring their products to market.

Dynamic Dispersions LLC machine program, laboratory, production machines and complete production lines, is customized for each application. Mixing and dispersing machines and a full range of wet grinding machines capable of grinding materials to the nanometer range, we have the ability to tailor our machines to your demanding dispersion application.  

Capable of producing sub 100 nanometer particles using our proprietary and patent pending vertical milling technology, Dynamic Dispersions can cost effectively produce difficult to grind materials. Dynamic Dispersions milling technology uses no screens or mechanical seals, reducing capital costs, maintenance costs and operating costs to economically produce products in the 100 nanometer range.

Name: NANOTUL, Ltd.
Description:
INNOVATIVE, PORTABLE AND USER-FRIENDLY INSTRUMENT for monitoring of nanoparticles and nanodroplets in air. 

We are developing an innovative instrument for monitoring nanodroplets and aerosols in indoor air. These droplets and aerosols are frequently responsible for the spread of infections. The spread of airborne pathogens in crowded places is a global issue especially during the Covid-19 pandemic. However, instrumentation for aerosol monitoring is costly and complex. Nanotul is developing a portable device for counting and measuring nanodroplets and aerosols in indoor air. Our accurate and user-friendly design can also be used for testing of inhaler-dosed drugs and analysis of droplets in the atmosphere.

Our sensor can be used for:
* counting droplets in the air to prevent disease spreading (medical / hospital),
* testing of inhalers-dosed drugs (medical / pharmacy),
* analysis of droplets in the clouds (meteorology) and spray mist (agriculture), 
* monitoring of air pollution with particles (air quality). 

We are interested in partnering with Industry or Academia / Research to further develop the technology. We are also interested in pilot projects with organizations with access to potential users and use cases for our innovative and portable air quality measurement device.

Name: Nanoventi
Description:
Montreal based, award-winning Nanogrande corp. and serial entrepreneur Gary Oberman, have recently joined forces to form NanoVenti corp, inventors of the world's first-ever truly reusable medical and civilian grade facial respirators and masks.

The company’s patent-pending technology combines self-cleaning nanotubes and state of the art polymers to facilitate scale production of its proprietary N99, N95 and N90 medical and civilian grade facial respirators. Nanoventi has developed nanometer (nm) precise injection molds which will be used to produce millions of precision facial respirators rendering disposable alternatives virtually obsolete.

The Nanomask design is based on a washable, transparent polymer that delivers unrivaled safety and comfort. The mask has a zero-waste footprint and completely eliminates environmental waste. “The wearing of non-transparent masks has triggered a plethora of both security and social concerns which our technology will address by returning the face back to the equation of what might now be considered the new normal” says co-founder Gary Oberman.

The average civilian requires approximately 20 disposable masks per month while the average front line medical worker consumes 5 to 7, N95 high-grade masks per day costing governments approximately $6,000USD per year in disposable waste per worker. The Nanoventi equivalent will cost less then 1/40th of that across 2 yrs and virtually eliminate environmental waste.

The primary shell of the respirator is made from a soft polymer which can be color tuned or left without pigment to produce crystal clear transparency. The mask contains a filtration platform of self-cleaning nanotubes and can be 100% sterilized using a conventional dishwasher or cold washed using CS20 cold sterilizing without degrading the structures or properties of the respirator.

The soft feel and effective nanoventing of the mask, as well as anti-fogging, make it an ideal choice for either medical or civilan applications

Name: GIBMEC

Microencapsulation structures refer to a type of material processing in order to produce small particles of a microcapsule structure, a popular kind of which are liposomal structures. In these structures, the target compounds are coated with a shell material to create microcapsule particles that can be released at a certain rate under certain conditions. GIBMEC has done extensive research on microfluidic encapsulation and is currently using it to process a variety of products in different industries. For example, GIBMEC processes supplements and nutrients as raw materials for large food companies. These products are processed in the form of microcapsules using microfluidic encapsulation. Name: Lignin-BioForce
Description:
Lignin is nature’s own inexhaustible resource. Lignin can be used to make many wearable products and cut plastic consumption, such as in the shoe industry, where it can replace plastic in soles.

Lignin can be found in every tree and plant on earth, constituting about a third of their biomass. Lignin is, by nature, a branched and cross-linked polymer, which contains both hydrophobic and hydrophilic groups. It has therefore found a myriad of applications as emulsifier, dispersant, binder, adhesive and additive in industries as diverse as construction, agriculture, water treatment, oil drilling and ore processing. Lignin can also be turned into plastic for injection moulding and even bio-based carbon fibres.

Lignin can also be converted to plastic and decrease the carbon footprint of many products. Many manufacturers say lignin meets their production demands very well, as it is an environmentally friendly raw material found almost worldwide. It is a true, viable alternative to plastics, distinguished by its qualities, availability, and superiority over oil-based products.

Name: Microsurface Corporation
Description:
Micro Surface Corporation started out in 1919 as Timesaver Products Company Inc., makers of TimeSaver Lapping Compounds.
It served manufacturers for the military and automotive industries with worldwide distribution of its product.

Over the years many uses have been found for the compound including lapping bearings, machine tools, molds and more.
In the early 1980s, the company was renamed as Micro Surface Corporation to add new technologies to its manufacturing arsenal. Seeing the need to apply dry lubricants in the hi-tech industries, Micro Surface successfully was able to transfer lubricant technology developed by NASA to commercial applications.

Since then it has expanded its offerings to include WS2 coating services. The WS2 product was originally developed for the Mariner Space Mission as a permanent lubricant, today it is used on countless applications from gears and bearings to molds and robotics automation.

The next advancement came by improving the method of coating with the introduction of their proprietary process SL-39 which dramatically improves the finish and overall quality of the coating.

At a customer’s request, Micro Surface Corporation was asked to apply molybdenum disulfide utilizing the same process. The experiment was a success and MoS2 coating was added to our service capabilities.

Today, Micro Surface Corporation is located in San Jose, California, the heart of the Silicon Valley. We continue to provide dry film lubricant coating services throughout the country and ship our Timesaver Lapping Compounds all around the world. We have been under our current ownership since 2003 and are looking for ways to expand our presence in the coating and lapping/finishing arenas while maintaining the high level of quality and customer service our customers have relied on for years.

Micro Surface Corporation is continuously looking for new coating processes to offer as well as developing new products to add to its line

Name: Q Flo
Description:
Q-FLO | Leading the Future of Carbon Nanotube Innovation

Q-FLO is a world leader in the development and production of carbon nanotubes, bringing pioneering materials technology to life. As a spin-out from the University of Cambridge, our roots in academic research from the Department of Engineering and Department of Material Science drive our vision for innovation. Founded by a dedicated team of experts, Q-FLO is advancing carbon nanotube technology to reshape industries and elevate sustainable practices.

Our Vision and Sustainable Approach

With our primary R&D hub in Cambridge and an advanced production facility in St. Helens, Merseyside, Q-FLO is expanding the possibilities for scalable, high-impact applications of ultra-long carbon nanotubes. Sustainability is at the core of our mission: our manufacturing process supports a circular economy, leveraging clean hydrogen recycling. 

Innovative Applications Across Industries

From aerospace and automotive to electronics and energy, Q-FLO’s technologies deliver transformative, sustainable solutions. Our focus is not only on advancing carbon nanotube production but also on ensuring our process actively contributes to sustainable industry practices.

Why Q-FLO?

With a foundation in top-tier research and a commitment to high-growth, sustainable innovation, Q-FLO is positioned to lead in bringing advanced, circular economy-driven materials to market, making a positive impact across industries worldwide.

Name: The Hofmann Group  - Cambridge
Description:
Nano-manufacturing the materials of tomorrow

The ability to engineer device materials at a sub-100nm scale opens unmatched opportunities to tailor enhanced electrical, optical, magnetic and mechanical properties and functionalities that can be effectively integrated and combined into new form factors and technologies. Inasmuch as integrated circuits and systems shaped our society over the last decades, integrated nanomaterials are set to have revolutionary impact on an ever increasing number of sectors, including information & communication technologies, healthcare, energy conversion and storage, security, transport and environmental technologies. With the size of materials reduced to nm-size scale, their properties not only depend ever more closely on their detailed structure, size, shape and dimensionality but importantly also on their surfaces and interfaces. Much of the new functionality arises from the ability to combine an increasing diversity of materials and achieve greater structural complexity and more complex device architectures. This necessitates new growth and heterogeneous material integration strategies, and for nanomaterials bottom-up or self-assembly approaches are thereby of crucial importance. We investigate crystal growth of nanomaterials that is at the heart of all such emerging technology and is the key future enabler. 

Embedded in Cambridge's strong research community we collaborate with many research groups and industries across the world, bringing our findings to the market through spin-outs (e.g. Abselion) and educating the next generation of nanoscience researchers in the affiliated centre of doctoral training (NanoDTC).

Name: The Quantum Puzzle
Description:
In 1861, James Clerk–Maxwell published Part II of his four-part series "On physical lines of force". In it, he attempted to construct a vortex model of the magnetic field but after much effort neither he, nor other late nineteenth century physicists who followed him, managed to produce a workable theory. What survived from these attempts were Maxwell's four equations of electrodynamics together with the Lorentz force law, formulae that made no attempt to describe an underlying reality but stood only as a mathematical description of the observed phenomena. When the quantum of action was introduced by Planck in 1900 the difficulties that had faced Maxwell's generation were still unresolved. Since then theories of increasing mathematical complexity have been constructed to attempt to bring the totality of phenomena into order with little success. This work examines the problems that had been abandoned long before quantum mechanics was formulated in 1925 and argues that these issues need to be revisited before real progress in the quantum theory of the electromagnetic field can be made.

Readership: Advanced undergraduate and graduate students interested in quantum physics.
